title: A Multi-Level Architecture for Reusable Materials Ontologies -- The OntoCrafter Ceramics Ontology (OCO) as Reference Implementation
summary: The Materials Science and Engineering ontology landscape is fragmented along multiple axes simultaneously. Horizontally: a recent survey identified 94 ontologies of which over 40 are structurally incompatible; each new application domain -- ceramics, polymers, batteries, smart materials -- typically restarts ontology design from scratch. Vertically: EU regulation (CSRD, CSDDD, PPWR, CBAM, R2R, AI Act, ESPR) forces material, manufacturing, supply-chain, and lifecycle data into integrated digital product passports, leaving ontologies that only address horizontal fragmentation incomplete for any contemporary consumer. And mechanistically: a vocabulary that records that BNT-BT has $d_{33} \approx 580$ pC/N stores a fact but cannot surface why -- Bi-6s$^2$ lone-pair stereo-activity, anomalous Born effective charges, soft modes, defect chemistry -- without a systematic explanation skeleton. We propose a multi-level modular architecture with two independent classification axes -- level of abstraction (L0 bridges, L1 material-agnostic laboratory-notebook, L2 material-class-specific, L3 categorical reasoning) and consumer audience (material vs. compliance) -- in which the material-specific level is internally organised by a seven-tier mechanistic-explanation skeleton (Symmetry, Energy/DFT, Thermo/CALPHAD, Kinetics, Microstructure, Defect chemistry, Bonding) applicable to any crystalline ionic oxide. The level-and-audience modularity dissolves the horizontal fragmentation, the compliance audience absorbs the vertical regulation pressure, and the seven-tier organisation of Level 2 delivers the mechanistic explanation depth. We instantiate the architecture as the OntoCrafter Ceramics Ontology (OCO v0.94): 5,196 classes across 44 modules; 167,348 OWL axioms (40,454 logical); 1,674 properties; 829 cross-ontology bridge mappings; 1,172 SHACL shapes; 163 published competency questions.

AI.tldr: 材料科学与工程本体论领域存在水平、垂直和机制三个维度的碎片化问题。本文提出一种多层级模块化架构，通过两个独立分类轴（抽象层级和受众）来解决碎片化，并实例化为OntoCrafter陶瓷本体（OCO v0.94），包含5,196个类、44个模块、167,348条OWL公理等。
AI.motivation: 现有材料科学本体论存在三重碎片化问题：(1) 水平方向：94个本体中40多个结构不兼容，每个新应用领域（陶瓷、聚合物、电池等）都从头设计本体；(2) 垂直方向：欧盟法规（CSRD、CSDDD、PPWR等）要求材料、制造、供应链和生命周期数据集成到数字产品护照中，现有本体不完整；(3) 机制层面：现有本体只能记录事实（如BNT-BT的d33≈580 pC/N），但无法解释背后机制（如Bi-6s²孤对电子立体活性等）。
AI.method: 提出多层级模块化架构，包含两个独立分类轴：(1) 抽象层级：L0（桥梁层）、L1（材料无关的实验笔记本层）、L2（材料类特定层）、L3（范畴推理层）；(2) 受众轴：材料科学受众 vs. 合规受众。L2层内部采用七层机制解释骨架（对称性/DFT、热力学/CALPHAD、动力学、微观结构、缺陷化学、键合）。实例化为OntoCrafter陶瓷本体（OCO v0.94）。
AI.result: OCO v0.94包含：5,196个类（44个模块）、167,348条OWL公理（其中40,454条逻辑公理）、1,674个属性、829个跨本体桥接映射、1,172个SHACL形状、163个已发布的胜任力问题。
AI.conclusion: 层级-受众模块化解决了水平碎片化问题，合规受众轴吸收了垂直法规压力，L2层的七层组织提供了机制解释深度。该架构为材料科学本体论碎片化提供了系统性的解决方案。

title: Designing Strong and Broadband Nonreciprocal Thermal Radiation in Magnetic Topological Materials
summary: Breaking reciprocity in thermal radiation opens opportunities for energy harvesting, sensing, and thermal management. Traditional nonreciprocal radiative semiconductor devices need external magnetic field. In this work, we predict a series of magnetic topological materials for magnetic-field-free nonreciprocal thermal radiation in the infrared regime, by combining first-principles calculations with Maxwell electrodynamics. We find strong and broadband nonreciprocity in magnetic Weyl semimetals (e.g., Co$_3$Sn$_2$S$_2$), outperforming the conventional semiconductor such as InAs. Furthermore, we propose universal material design recipes: strong nonreciprocity requires a large anomalous Hall response relative to the optical loss, whereas the broadband response favors large optical loss and small dielectric dispersion. Our work establishes a predictive materials-discovery framework and quantitative design rules for next-generation magnet-free nonreciprocal thermal devices.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算和麦克斯韦电磁学，预测了一系列无需外磁场的磁性拓扑材料，在红外波段实现强且宽带的非互易热辐射，超越了传统半导体InAs，并提出了材料设计准则。
AI.motivation: 热辐射中的非互易性在能量收集、传感和热管理中有重要应用，但传统器件需要外加磁场，限制了实际应用。本文旨在寻找无需外磁场的非互易热辐射材料。
AI.method: 结合第一性原理计算与麦克斯韦电磁学，对磁性拓扑材料进行高通量预测，并通过 anomalous Hall 响应与光学损耗的比值来评估非互易性强度。
AI.result: 发现磁性Weyl半金属（如Co₃Sn₂S₂）在红外波段表现出强且宽带的非互易性，性能优于传统半导体InAs；强非互易性需要大的反常霍尔响应与光学损耗之比，宽带响应则偏好大的光学损耗和小的介电色散。
AI.conclusion: 建立了预测性材料发现框架和定量设计规则，为下一代无磁铁非互易热辐射器件奠定了基础。

title: Absence of orbital current torque in a magnetic metal/Pt/CuOx trilayer
summary: Naturally oxidized copper (CuOx) was cited as an exceptionally strong orbital-current source despite the keen debate over the concept of orbital current. Here, we report unambiguous experimental evidence for the absence of a detectable orbital-current torque in the Fe/Pt/CuOx trilayers. Using a magnetic metal detector of Fe thin film with a negligible self-induced torque, the damping-like torque due to Pt/CuOx bilayers is clarified to entirely arise from the spin Hall spin current of the Pt. As the Pt thickness increases, the torque for Fe/Pt/CuOx and Fe/Pt/MgO increases coherently and monotonically, as exactly expected from the spin Hall effect of Pt and the drift-diffusion model of spin angular momentum. These findings suggest poor generality or even universal absence of orbital current torque.

AI.tldr: 本文通过实验证明Fe/Pt/CuOx三层结构中不存在可探测的轨道电流力矩，其阻尼类力矩完全源于Pt的自旋霍尔效应，否定了CuOx作为强轨道电流源的观点。
AI.motivation: 此前有研究声称自然氧化的铜（CuOx）是极强的轨道电流源，但轨道电流概念本身存在激烈争议。本文旨在通过明确实验证据检验CuOx是否真的能产生可观测的轨道电流力矩。
AI.method: 使用自诱导力矩可忽略的Fe薄膜作为磁性金属探测器，系统测量Fe/Pt/CuOx和Fe/Pt/MgO三层结构中的阻尼类力矩随Pt厚度的变化，并与基于自旋霍尔效应和漂移-扩散模型的理论预期进行比较。
AI.result: Pt/CuOx双层膜产生的阻尼类力矩完全来自Pt的自旋霍尔自旋流；随着Pt厚度增加，Fe/Pt/CuOx和Fe/Pt/MgO的力矩一致且单调增加，与自旋霍尔效应和漂移-扩散模型的预测完全吻合。
AI.conclusion: 轨道电流力矩缺乏普适性，甚至可能普遍不存在，此前报道的CuOx作为强轨道电流源的结论可能是错误的。

title: Atomistic insights into the structural, thermal, and mechanical evolution of $Zr_{47.5}Cu_{47.5}Ag_{5}$ bulk metallic glass
summary: Bulk metallic glasses (BMGs) are distinguished by amorphous atomic structures that confer superior mechanical performance; however, the evolution of these properties in ternary bulk configurations remains insufficiently explored. In this study, we employed large-scale molecular dynamics simulations to investigate the structural, thermal, and mechanical properties of $Zr_{47.5}Cu_{47.5}Ag_{5}$ BMGs. Our thermodynamic and topological analyses, utilizing potential energy regression and the Modified Wendt-Abraham parameter, identified a glass transition temperature ($T_g$) of approximately $692\text{ K}$. Structural characterization via Voronoi tessellation and partial radial distribution functions reveals that the amorphous matrix is stabilized by icosahedral clusters, with Ag atoms inducing significant chemical heterogeneity through localized nano-clustering. Thermal transport properties, computed via the Green-Kubo formalism, demonstrate a monotonic decrease in conductivity with temperature, consistent with structural scattering saturation in disordered lattices. Mechanical tensile testing reveals that the material exhibits robust rate- and temperature-dependent behavior, with yield strengths reaching $\approx 2.3\text{ GPa}$ at room temperature. We show that macroscopic strain-softening is intrinsically linked to the thermally induced collapse of rigid icosahedral motifs, which facilitates shear band percolation. These findings provide a structural rationale for the beneficial role of Ag dopants in enhancing the resilience of multicomponent metallic glasses.

AI.tldr: 本文通过大规模分子动力学模拟，研究了Zr₄₇.₅Cu₄₇.₅Ag₅块体金属玻璃的结构、热学和力学性能，发现Ag掺杂通过形成局域纳米团簇增强化学异质性，而宏观应变软化与二十面体团簇的热诱导崩溃密切相关。
AI.motivation: 三元块体金属玻璃的性能演化尚未被充分探索，特别是Ag掺杂对材料性能的影响机制尚不明确。
AI.method: 采用大规模分子动力学模拟，结合势能回归和改进的Wendt-Abraham参数进行热力学分析；利用Voronoi镶嵌和偏径向分布函数进行结构表征；通过Green-Kubo方法计算热传输性质；进行力学拉伸测试研究温度与应变率依赖性。
AI.result: 玻璃化转变温度约692 K；Ag原子诱导局域纳米团簇化，导致显著的化学异质性；热导率随温度单调下降；室温屈服强度约2.3 GPa；应变软化与二十面体团簇的热诱导崩溃相关。
AI.conclusion: Ag掺杂通过结构层面的机制增强了多组分金属玻璃的韧性，二十面体团簇的稳定性对力学性能起关键作用。

title: Interlayer pairing mechanism for bilayer nickelate superconductors
summary: The discovery of superconductivity in Ruddlesden-Popper bilayer nickelates under both high pressure and ambient conditions has opened a new paradigm for exploring unconventional superconductivity. This review provides a brief survey of theoretical progress on bilayer nickelate superconductors. Drawing from the key experimental observations, we summarize essential physical ingredients including the hybridized Ni-3$d_{x^2-y^2}$ and 3$d_{z^2}$ electronic structure, orbital-dependent electronic correlation, Hund's coupling, and strong interlayer magnetic coupling. The fundamental theoretical models including the bilayer two-orbital Hubbard model and its minimal $t$-$J$ variants are introduced. Starting from the atomic-limit interlayer valence bond picture of the half-filled $d_{z^2}$ orbital, we elaborate on strong correlation interlayer pairing mechanisms based on different limiting considerations. Specific emphasis is placed on the hybridization mechanism, where the $d_{z^2}$ local singlet pairs provide the pairing energy and their hybridization with itinerant $d_{x^2-y^2}$ promotes superconducting phase coherence. We further analyze the pairing symmetry, the dependence of $T_c$ on various internal and external parameters, the nontrivial normal state properties including the Fermi liquid, non-Fermi liquid, weakly insulating and pseudogap behaviors. Effects of pressure tuning, oxygen content, and Kondo scattering induced by oxygen vacancies are also discussed. Finally, weak correlation theories based on spin fluctuations associated with Fermi surface nesting are briefly covered.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了双层镍酸盐超导体（特别是在Ruddlesden-Popper结构中的研究进展），重点介绍了从强关联视角出发的理论进展，包括轨道杂化、电子关联、Hund耦合及层间配对机制等核心物理要素，并探讨了超导配对对称性、转变温度调控及正常态性质。
AI.motivation: 双层镍酸盐在高压和常压条件下均被发现有超导电性，为探索非常规超导提供了新平台。本文旨在系统梳理相关理论进展，整合关键实验事实，提炼核心物理图像，推动对该体系超导机理的深入理解。
AI.method: 本文采用综述性研究方法，从实验观测出发归纳关键物理要素（如Ni-3d轨道杂化、轨道依赖电子关联、Hund耦合及层间磁耦合），引入双层双轨道Hubbard模型及其最小t-J变体等理论模型，并基于原子极限层间价键图像阐述强关联层间配对机制，特别强调d_{z^2}局域单重态配对与d_{x^2-y^2}巡游电子杂化对超导相干的促进作用。
AI.result: 总结了超导配对对称性、Tc对不同参数（压力、氧含量等）的依赖关系，以及包括费米液体、非费米液体、弱绝缘体和赝能隙等在内的正常态行为；还讨论了Kondo散射、氧空位等效应，并简要涉及基于费米面嵌套的自旋涨落弱关联理论。
AI.conclusion: 双层镍酸盐超导体展现出丰富的强关联物理现象，其超导机制可能源于d_{z^2}轨道局域单重态与d_{x^2-y^2}巡游电子的杂化配对；压力、氧含量等调控手段可有效影响超导性质，为理解非常规超导提供了新视角。

title: Analyzing Initialization Strategies for the Local Unitary Cluster Jastrow Ansatz within the Quantum-Centric Supercomputing Framework
summary: In this study, we analyze the choice of local unitary cluster Jastrow (LUCJ) ansatz initialization and sensitivity of the sample-based quantum diagonalization (SQD) algorithm within the quantum-centric supercomputing (QCSC) framework. We examine six initialization strategies, including those based on coupled-cluster singles and doubles (CCSD), Møller-Plesset second-order perturbation theory (MP2), data-driven coupled-cluster (DDCC), and trivial (zeroes and random) initializations, across twelve molecular systems and three basis sets (STO-3G, cc-pVDZ, and aug-cc-pVDZ). We find that while the mean absolute percentage errors (MAPEs) between the alternative and CCSD-initialized t2-amplitudes span many orders of magnitude, the resulting SQD energies are largely insensitive to this variation. In particular, most initializations recover energies within chemical accuracy (+/-1.6 mEh) of the CCSD reference, with convergence improving as the basis set size increases. Notably, random initialization achieves performance competitive with CCSD across all basis sets, while zeroes initialization, despite having smaller deviations from CCSD, yields the worst energy agreement. Our results highlight that the proximity to the CCSD initialization is not a reliable predictor of the quality of electronic energies. These findings establish that configuration recovery within SQD, rather than circuit initialization, is the dominant factor governing energy accuracy, and suggest that computationally cheaper initialization strategies are viable alternatives to CCSD for QCSC workflows

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了量子-centric超级计算框架下，局域幺正团簇Jastrow (LUCJ) 初态初始化策略对基于样本的量子对角化 (SQD) 算法性能的影响。通过对比CCSD、MP2、DDCC、零值及随机等六种初始化方法在12个分子系统和3种基组下的表现，发现SQD能量对初态选择高度不敏感，绝大多数初始化均能达到化学精度，随机初始化表现尤为突出。研究表明，SQD中的构型恢复而非电路初始化才是决定能量精度的主导因素，廉价的初始化策略可作为CCSD的有效替代方案。
AI.motivation: 探究在QCSC框架下，不同LUCJ初态初始化策略对SQD算法能量精度的影响，评估CCSD等计算昂贵方法是否可以被更廉价的初始化策略替代，并厘清初始化质量与最终能量精度的关系。
AI.method: 在12个分子系统和STO-3G、cc-pVDZ、aug-cc-pVDZ三种基组下，测试CCSD、MP2、DDCC、零值及随机等六种初始化策略，通过对比MAPE和能量误差分析各初始化方法的性能。
AI.result: 各初始化策略的t2振幅相对于CCSD的MAPE跨越多个数量级，但大部分初始化方法得到的SQD能量均在化学精度（±1.6 mEh）内；随机初始化表现与CCSD相当，而零值初始化虽更接近CCSD却能量最差；基组越大收敛性越好。
AI.conclusion: 初始化与CCSD的接近程度不是能量精度的可靠预测指标；SQD中的构型恢复是主导因素；计算上更廉价的初始化策略（如随机初始化）可作为CCSD的可行替代方案。

title: Jahn-Teller effect in $j = 3/2$ Mott insulators: Ground states and thermal fluctuations
comment: 5 pages, 4 figures + End Matter, Supplementary Materials
summary: The interplay of strong atomic spin-orbit coupling with Jahn-Teller (JT) lattice distortions is an important theme in quantum materials hosting heavy atoms. A prototypical example of such a system is a degenerate $j = 3/2$ multiplet coupled to local phonon modes. Here, we study the multipolar ground states of this system as realized in Mott insulators, explore its thermal phase diagram via an $SU(4)$ spin Monte Carlo approach coupled to JT phonons, and study the temperature dependent splittings of the $j = 3/2$ multiplet as relevant to spectroscopic probes. Our work sheds light on coexisting distinct multipolar orders engendered by phonon coupling, role of thermal JT fluctuations, and the entropy of the coupled multipole-phonon system. We discuss broad implications for double perovskites $\rm Ba_2MgReO_6$, $\rm Ba_2NaOsO_6$ and lacunar spinels such as $\rm GaTa_4Se_8$ and $\rm GaNb_4Se_8$.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了强自旋-轨道耦合与Jahn-Teller晶格畸变在$j=3/2$多重态体系中的相互作用，通过SU(4)自旋蒙特卡洛方法结合JT声子，揭示了多极基态、热相图及温度依赖的多重态分裂，并为多种量子材料提供了理论解释。
AI.motivation: 理解强原子自旋-轨道耦合与Jahn-Teller晶格畸变之间的相互作用是量子材料中重原子体系的重要主题。作者旨在系统研究$j=3/2$多重态与局域声子模耦合下的多极基态和热力学行为。
AI.method: 采用SU(4)自旋蒙特卡洛方法耦合JT声子，通过数值模拟研究Mott绝缘体中$j=3/2$多重态的多极基态、热相图以及温度依赖的多重态分裂。
AI.result: 发现了声子耦合诱导的共存多极序、热JT涨落的重要作用，以及耦合多极-声子系统的熵特性。得到了与光谱探针相关的温度依赖的$j=3/2$多重态分裂结果。
AI.conclusion: 该工作阐明了声子耦合如何产生共存的不同多极序，揭示了热JT涨落和熵的贡献，并为双钙钛矿和空位尖晶石等实验体系提供了理论支撑。

title: Machine Learning-Driven Chemical Reactor Network Modeling of the Sandia-D Flame
summary: Turbulent combustion simulations are crucial for many scientific and engineering systems. However, the high cost to fully resolve the complex multiscale and multiphysics behavior makes direct simulation typically infeasible. The equivalent reactor network (ERN) approach attempts to improve computational efficiency by replacing a multidimensional turbulent simulation with a series of much cheaper 0-D and 1-D chemical reactors, providing a surrogate model that retains detailed chemistry at the cost of simplified flow physics. However, their development remains a challenge, often requiring either expert analysis, or automated approaches that sacrifice accuracy. In this work, we develop an automated machine-learning-assisted framework for constructing ERNs of the Sandia-D turbulent methane/air flame. Principal component analysis is first used to reduce high-dimensional thermochemical computational fluid dynamics (CFD) data to a low-dimensional latent space, where k-means clustering identifies physically interpretable flame regions used to initialize a reactor-network graph. This initialization is then refined using finite-difference gradient descent wrapped around non-differentiable Cantera reactor simulations. Across 30 RANS simulations spanning a range of pilot temperatures and inlet methane compositions, the optimized 7-reactor ERN achieves a maximum-temperature $R^2$ score of 0.7945 while preserving a $\sim6000\times$ speedup over the CFD solver. Outlet CO prediction remains more challenging, with a final $R^2$ score of $-0.4183$, but improves substantially from the unoptimized clustering initialization. These results show that unsupervised thermochemical feature extraction can provide effective physics-informed initializations for ERN construction, while gradient-based refinement can significantly improve predictive accuracy without manual reactor-network design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于机器学习的自动化框架，用于构建等效反应器网络（ERN），以替代高成本的湍流燃烧CFD模拟。在Sandia-D甲烷/空气火焰的测试中，优化的7反应器ERN在保持约6000倍加速比的同时，实现了最大温度R²=0.7945，但出口CO预测仍有挑战（R²=-0.4183）。
AI.motivation: 湍流燃烧模拟对科学和工程至关重要，但直接数值模拟因多尺度、多物理特性而计算成本过高。等效反应器网络（ERN）通过简化流动物理来提升效率，但传统ERN构建依赖专家经验或牺牲精度的自动化方法，缺乏高效且准确的自动化手段。
AI.method: 首先使用主成分分析（PCA）降维高维热化学CFD数据，然后通过k-means聚类识别火焰区域并初始化反应器网络图。接着，利用有限差分梯度下降（围绕不可微的Cantera反应器模拟）对初始网络进行优化。
AI.result: 在30组RANS模拟（涵盖不同引燃温度和进口甲烷组分）中，优化后的7反应器ERN的最大温度R²达0.7945，相比CFD求解器实现约6000倍加速。出口CO预测的R²为-0.4183，但相比未优化的聚类初始化有显著提升。
AI.conclusion: 无监督热化学特征提取能提供有效的物理信息初始化，梯度优化的ERN在无需人工设计的情况下显著提升了预测精度，验证了所提自动化框架的可行性。

title: Ising Dirac fermions across a topological phase transition
summary: Dirac fermions have attracted significant interest due to their relativistic dispersions and close connections to topological physics, yet they are generally expected to be gapped in two-dimensional systems with strong Ising spin orbit coupling, making their realization in such materials an outstanding challenge. Here we report the emergence of six fold degenerate Dirac fermions in an Ising moire system across a quantum spin Hall transition in twisted WSe2. In a 3.65 degree device, we observe a quantum spin Hall phase at high electric fields with nearly quantized resistance h/(2e2), and a Dirac semimetal phase over a broad range of electric fields near zero field. Magnetotransport measurements of the Dirac phase exhibit a half-integer Landau fan sequence, characteristic of Dirac fermions, with six-fold degeneracy on the hole-doped side and two fold degeneracy on the electron-doped side. Temperature dependence shows weakly metallic behavior consistent with a semimetallic state. Our twist-angle-dependent transport measurements map out a complete phase diagram and identify a critical twist angle of 3.3 degree, establishing the phase boundary between the quantum spin Hall and Dirac semimetal regimes. Our work establishes a new route to realizing Dirac fermions in strongly spin orbit coupled moire systems through a topological phase transition, providing a promising platform for high mobility spintronics.

AI.tldr: 本文在扭曲WSe₂莫尔系统中，通过量子自旋霍尔到狄拉克半金属的拓扑相变，实验实现了六重简并的狄拉克费米子，并绘制了完整的相图。
AI.motivation: 在强伊辛自旋轨道耦合的二维体系中，狄拉克费米子通常被认为会打开能隙，因此如何在这样的材料中实现狄拉克费米子是一个悬而未决的挑战。
AI.method: 通过构建3.65°扭曲WSe₂莫尔系统，施加电场调控，结合磁输运测量、Landau能级扇图分析以及转角依赖的输运测量，系统研究了量子自旋霍尔相与狄拉克半金属相之间的拓扑相变。
AI.result: 实验观察到：(1) 高电场下的量子自旋霍尔相，电阻接近h/(2e²)；(2) 零场附近宽电场范围内的狄拉克半金属相；(3) 空穴掺杂侧呈现六重简并、电子掺杂侧呈现二重简并的半整数Landau扇序列；(4) 确定了临界转角3.3°为相边界。
AI.conclusion: 该工作开辟了在强自旋轨道耦合莫尔系统中通过拓扑相变实现狄拉克费米子的新路径，为高迁移率自旋电子学提供了有前景的平台。

title: Plateau Gaps of Poisson Correctors Encode Metastable Reaction Rates
summary: Metastable reaction rates are commonly inferred from transition-state fluxes, mean first-passage times, or fitted kinetic models. We show that they are directly encoded in the plateau gap of an occupation-time Poisson corrector. For a centered basin-occupation observable, the Poisson corrector develops metastable plateaus in the reactant and product basins, and their separation determines the forward and backward transition rates. This construction requires only the generator, stationary measure, and metastable partition, and therefore does not rely on a predefined transition-state surface. In overdamped and underdamped double-well dynamics, the plateau-gap rate recovers the Kramers, Grote-Hynes, and Pollak-Grabert-Hänggi hierarchy. The same corrector-martingale decomposition yields a reactive-noise density, revealing where stochastic forcing contributes to transitions in configuration or phase space. Thus, reaction rates and their fluctuation sources emerge from a single corrector field.

AI.tldr: 本文提出一种基于占据时间泊松修正子的新方法，通过其平台间隙直接推断亚稳态反应速率，无需预定义过渡态表面，并在双阱动力学中恢复Kramers等经典理论层次，同时提供反应噪声密度的分解。
AI.motivation: 传统推断亚稳态反应速率的方法（如过渡态通量、平均首次通过时间、拟合动力学模型）通常依赖预定义的过渡态表面。本文旨在提出一种不依赖过渡态表面的直接编码反应速率的新方法，并揭示随机力在驱动反应中的空间分布。
AI.method: 作者通过构建占据时间的泊松修正子，观测其在反应物和产物盆地的亚稳态平台，利用平台间隙直接计算正向和反向反应速率。该方法仅需生成元、平稳测度和亚稳态划分，无需过渡态表面。进一步通过校正子-鞅分解导出反应噪声密度。
AI.result: 在过阻尼和欠阻尼双阱动力学中，平台间隙速率恢复Kramers、Grote-Hynes、Pollak-Grabert-Hänggi理论层次。校正子-鞅分解提供了反应噪声密度，揭示构型空间或相空间中随机力对过渡的贡献位置。
AI.conclusion: 反应速率及其涨落源可从单个校正子场中统一获得，为分析亚稳态系统的过渡机制提供了新框架。

title: Precipitation strengthening: a collective multi-dislocation phenomenon
summary: Precipitation strengthening is a cornerstone of physical metallurgy, delivering otherwise unattainable combinations of strength and ductility. The approach relies on nanoscale precipitates that impede the motion of dislocations, the primary carriers of plastic deformation. Historically, precipitation strengthening has been rationalized via two idealized, limiting mechanisms: dislocations either cut through or bow around precipitates. However, in situ experiments cannot yet resolve the coupled, real-time evolution of dislocation networks and nanoprecipitates, leaving these atomic-scale dynamics inaccessible to direct observation. Here, using large-scale atomistic simulations that fully capture these dynamics, we demonstrate that the classical cutting-versus-bowing dichotomy is incomplete. Instead, strengthening arises as an emergent collective phenomenon driven by concurrent, multi-dislocation interactions. These interactions simultaneously induce dislocation accumulation at interfaces, storage within precipitates, and precipitate-mediated multiplication inside the matrix. These findings establish a mechanistic framework that transcends traditional models and provides a new foundation for predicting strengthening behavior.

AI.tldr: 本文通过大规模原子模拟发现，沉淀强化并非传统的切割或绕过机制，而是由多位错同时相互作用产生的涌现集体现象。
AI.motivation: 传统的切割与绕过二分法无法解释位错网络与纳米沉淀物耦合的实时演化，实验手段也无法直接观测原子尺度的动态过程。
AI.method: 采用大规模原子模拟，完整捕捉位错网络与纳米沉淀物的耦合动力学行为。
AI.result: 发现强化源于多位错同时相互作用，包括位错在界面累积、在沉淀物内部储存以及沉淀物介导的基体位错增殖。
AI.conclusion: 建立了超越传统模型的机制框架，为预测强化行为提供了新基础。

title: Electronic structure trends in La$_{2}R$Ni$_2$O$_7$ ($R=$ Pr, Nd, Sm) from first-principles
summary: The discovery of superconductivity in bilayer La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ under pressure has sparked tremendous attention on Ruddlesden-Popper (RP) nickelates. Recently, a higher superconducting transition temperature of 96 K was reported in Sm-doped La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ single crystals at $\sim$ 22 GPa. Motivated by this experimental observation, we systematically explore the crystal structure and electronic properties of La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$ doped with different rare-earth elements in comparison to the undoped counterpart. As expected due to the effect of chemical pressure, we find that the volume of La$_{2}$$R$Ni$_2$O$_7$ ($R=$ Pr, Nd, Sm) progressively decreases with doping from Pr to Sm. We further find a pressure-induced structural transition to tetragonal symmetry that approximately coincides with the emergence of superconductivity in all cases. This transition is characterized by the emergence of flat $d_{z^2}$ bands at the Fermi level in the electronic structure. Despite subtle distinctions in the electronic structure between undoped and $R$-doped La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$, an increase in the dominant planar hopping is obtained as the $R$ size decreases. In contrast, the out-of-plane hopping decreases (in spite of the $c$ lattice constant compression), due to the decrease in the apical Ni-O$_{\rm rocksalt}$ bond length. Our findings provide further microscopic insights into the effects of $R$-doping in the electronic structure of RP nickelate superconductors in connection to $T_c$.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了在La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$中进行稀土元素（Pr、Nd、Sm）掺杂对晶体结构和电子性质的影响。研究发现，掺杂导致体积减小（化学压力效应），并出现压力诱导的结构相变至四方对称性，与超导电性的出现基本一致。该相变伴随着费米能级处平坦$d_{z^2}$带的出现。随着稀土离子半径减小，面内跳跃积分增加，而面外跳跃积分因顶端Ni-O键长缩短而减小。
AI.motivation: 受Sm掺杂La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$单晶在约22 GPa压力下实现96 K超导转变温度的实验发现启发，作者希望系统理解不同稀土元素掺杂对RP相镍酸盐超导体晶体结构和电子性质的影响，以揭示掺杂提高$T_c$的微观机制。
AI.method: 通过第一性原理计算，系统比较了未掺杂和掺杂不同稀土元素（Pr、Nd、Sm）的La$_3$Ni$_2$O$_7$的晶体结构（体积、晶格常数、键长等）和电子结构（能带、态密度、跳跃积分等）。
AI.result: 1) 掺杂后体积随稀土离子半径减小（Pr→Nd→Sm）而递减，符合化学压力效应；2) 所有体系中超导电性的出现均与压力诱导的四方结构相变相关，该相变伴随费米能级处平坦$d_{z^2}$带的出现；3) 稀土离子半径减小导致面内跳跃积分增加，但面外跳跃积分却因顶端Ni-O$_{\rm rocksalt}$键长缩短而减小。
AI.conclusion: 研究揭示了稀土掺杂通过化学压力效应调控RP相镍酸盐的电子结构，特别是面内和面外跳跃积分的竞争关系，为理解掺杂如何影响超导转变温度提供了微观层面的见解。

title: On the bottom-up construction of many-electron relativistic QED Hamiltonian
summary: The charge-conjugated second quantization introduced for a bottom-up construction of the many-electron relativistic QED Hamiltonian [J. Chem. Phys. 139, 014108 (2013)] is elucidated in terms of the quantized electronic and positronic Dirac fields, so as to make the concept more transparent.

AI.tldr: 本文通过量子化的电子和正电子Dirac场，澄清了电荷共轭二次量子化概念，使多电子相对论QED哈密顿量的自下而上构建更加透明。
AI.motivation: 为了更清晰地解释之前工作中引入的电荷共轭二次量子化概念，使其在多电子相对论QED哈密顿量构建中的应用更加易于理解。
AI.method: 利用量子化的电子和正电子Dirac场对电荷共轭二次量子化进行重新阐述和解释。
AI.result: 使电荷共轭二次量子化的物理意义及其在QED哈密顿量构建中的作用更加透明。
AI.conclusion: 通过Dirac场的视角，为多电子相对论QED哈密顿量的自下而上构建提供了更清晰的物理图像。

title: Topological Tricritical Ising Universality Class in One Dimension
comment: 24 pages, 17 figures. Any comments or suggestions are welcome!
summary: Recent advances have revealed that quantum critical universality can be enriched by nontrivial topology. Here we study the tricritical point of the one-dimensional cluster O Brien-Fendley model and show that it realizes a topologically nontrivial tricritical Ising ($\text{TCI}^*$) universality class. The transition shares the local bulk conformal data of ordinary TCI criticality, while realizing a distinct symmetry-enriched topological sector, manifested through a protected twofold degeneracy under open boundary conditions. We further show that TCI criticality admits two spontaneously fixed boundary conditions, realized respectively through symmetry enrichment and boundary renormalization-group flow, which are distinguished by the $\mathbb{Z}_2^T$ charge of the disorder field. Remarkably, we find that the topological twofold degeneracy at the $\text{TCI}^*$ critical point exhibits an exponential energy splitting, in stark contrast to the algebraic splitting at the $\text{Ising}^*$ critical point. These results reveal a symmetry-enriched form of TCI criticality and uncover topologically distinct boundary structures beyond those of the ordinary TCI theory.

AI.tldr: 本文研究一维cluster O'Brien-Fendley模型的三临界点，发现其实现了拓扑非平庸的三临界Ising (TCI*) 普适类，具有对称性增强的拓扑边界结构和指数级能级分裂，区别于普通TCI临界性。
AI.motivation: 探索量子临界普适性如何被非平庸拓扑所丰富，特别是寻找超越普通三临界Ising理论的新型拓扑临界行为。
AI.method: 对一维cluster O'Brien-Fendley模型的三临界点进行理论分析，研究其边界条件、对称性增强拓扑扇区、边界重整化群流，并比较TCI*与Ising*的能级分裂标度行为。
AI.result: 1) 实现了拓扑非平庸的TCI*普适类；2) TCI*具有受保护的双重简并度；3) 两种自发固定的边界条件，通过$\mathbb{Z}_2^T$电荷区分；4) TCI*临界点的拓扑双重简并呈现**指数级**能量分裂，而Ising*为代数级分裂。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了对称性增强的TCI临界性新形式，发现了超越普通TCI理论的拓扑不同边界结构，为量子临界性与拓扑的相互作用提供了新见解。

title: Distilling latent electrostatics from foundation machine learning interatomic potentials
summary: Foundation machine learning interatomic potentials (MLIPs) have enabled atomistic simulations across broad regions of chemical and materials space, but many remain computationally expensive and lack explicit electrostatics, limiting their use for systems governed by long-range interactions and electrical response. Previously, we introduced Latent Ewald Summation (LES), which learns latent atomic charges and long-range electrostatics from density functional theory (DFT) energy and force labels alone. Here, we use LES to extract electrostatics that are latent in foundation models: energies and forces predicted by a teacher model are used to train a lightweight LES-augmented student MLIP, with optional fine-tuning on additional DFT data. The resulting models reduce computational cost while providing access to Born effective charge tensors, and infrared spectra. We benchmark student models distilled from a broad set of foundation MLIPs, including UMA, MACE, Orb, eSEN, GemNet-OC, PET, and EquiformerV2-based models, against experimental infrared spectra for liquid water, concentrated hydrochloric acid, and the anatase TiO2(101)-water interface. Across these systems, electrostatic response can be extracted from most foundation MLIPs. The benchmark further shows that the underlying DFT level and dataset used to train the teacher model play a larger role than architecture in determining electrostatic and spectroscopic accuracy. For the TiO2-water interface, fine-tuning with a modest amount of higher-level DFT data improves structural and infrared predictions. LES-based distillation therefore provides a practical route for converting foundation MLIPs into efficient, electrically responsive models, while also testing the physical fidelity encoded in foundation models.

AI.tldr: 本文提出基于Latent Ewald Summation (LES)的知识蒸馏方法，将大型基础机器学习原子间势(MLIP)转化为轻量级、具有显式静电学的学生模型。通过从多种基础MLIP（UMA、MACE、Orb等）中蒸馏，并在液态水、盐酸、TiO2-水界面等体系上验证，发现底层DFT数据和数据集比网络架构对静电学精度影响更大，且少量高等级DFT微调即可改进界面体系的预测。
AI.motivation: 基础MLIP虽然覆盖广泛的化学空间，但大多计算昂贵且缺乏显式静电学，难以处理长程相互作用和电响应体系。作者希望将这些基础模型转化为高效、具有静电响应能力的模型，同时提取其中的静电学信息。
AI.method: 使用LES从基础MLIP（教师模型）中提取潜藏静电学，训练轻量级LES增强的学生MLIP。学生模型从教师模型的能量和力标签中学习，可选择性在额外DFT数据上微调。蒸馏对象包括UMA、MACE、Orb、eSEN、GemNet-OC、PET、EquiformerV2等多种基础MLIP。
AI.result: 在液态水、浓盐酸、锐钛矿TiO2(101)-水界面体系上，大多数基础MLIP都能提取出静电响应。底层DFT级别和数据集比模型架构对静电学和光谱精度的决定作用更大。对TiO2-水界面，少量高等级DFT微调即可改进结构预测和红外光谱。
AI.conclusion: 基于LES的蒸馏方法是一种实用的途径，可将基础MLIP转化为高效、具有电响应的模型，同时检验基础模型所编码的物理保真度。

title: Dominant spin Hall torque and negligible orbital Hall torque in α-W/ferromagnet heterostructures with artifacts-free angular momentum detectors
summary: α-phased W was theoretically predicted to have a negative spin Hall conductivity and a positive orbital Hall conductivity at the same time, leaving the physical origin of the current-induced torque a critical open question. Here, we develop two angular momentum detectors of Cu/Ni/Cu and Cu/FeCoB/Cu that are free of artifacts torques (e.g., self-induced torque and spin-vorticity torque) and clarify that the spin-orbit torque contributed by W remains negative and predominantly from the spin Hall effect in the entire thickness regime. With both detectors, the damping-like torque exhibits a monotonic decay as the W thickness increases above 5 nm, which results from the structural phase transition from \b{eta}-W to α-W. The negative torque in the entire thickness regime suggests negligible orbital Hall torque and orbital current from the α-W. This result is consistent with the theory that the orbital Hall effect from simplified band structure calculations is not a non-local angular momentum source. These findings suggest poor generality or even universal absence of orbital current.

AI.tldr: 本文通过开发无伪影扭矩的角动量探测器，实验证实了W薄膜中自旋轨道扭矩主要来源于自旋霍尔效应（负值），并否定了轨道霍尔效应产生非局域角动量源的普遍性，表明轨道电流可能缺乏普适性。
AI.motivation: α-W理论上同时具有负自旋霍尔电导率和正轨道霍尔电导率，导致电流感应扭矩的物理起源存在争议，亟需澄清。
AI.method: 开发了Cu/Ni/Cu和Cu/FeCoB/Cu两种无伪影扭矩（如自诱导扭矩和自旋涡度扭矩）的角动量探测器，系统测量W薄膜厚度变化下的阻尼类扭矩行为。
AI.result: W贡献的自旋轨道扭矩始终保持负值，主要来自自旋霍尔效应；当W厚度超过5 nm时，阻尼类扭矩单调衰减，对应β-W到α-W的结构相变；α-W中未观测到轨道霍尔扭矩或轨道电流。
AI.conclusion: 轨道霍尔效应基于简化能带计算并非非局域角动量源，轨道电流可能缺乏普适性甚至普遍不存在。

title: Quasiparticle Diffusion for the Toda Fluid in Equilibrium
summary: Many-body integrable systems can be understood as a gas of quasiparticles. They propagate ballistically and drive large-scale transport. However, with the exception of the hard rods system, no tools have been available to numerically track such quasiparticles. Focusing on the Toda fluid, whose integrability relies on the availability of a Lax pair, we present a numerical scheme to track quasiparticle trajectories as determined by the time-dependent eigenvectors of the Lax matrix. Simulating the Toda fluid in thermal equilibrium, this tracking scheme is used to numerical confirm Brownian motion of a quasiparticle. Simulated is also the motion of a tagged particle. Our numerical results for the diffusion constant matches with a novel TBA prediction. We believe our numerical scheme can be extended to other classical many-particle models possessing a Lax matrix.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于Lax矩阵特征向量追踪多体可积系统中准粒子轨迹的数值方法，并以Toda流体为例，数值验证了准粒子的布朗运动以及标记粒子的扩散行为，结果与热力学Bethe ansatz的理论预言一致。
AI.motivation: 除硬杆系统外，缺乏数值工具来追踪可积系统中准粒子的运动轨迹，这限制了对准粒子动力学行为（如布朗运动）的深入理解。
AI.method: 利用Toda流体的Lax对结构，通过计算Lax矩阵随时间演化的特征向量来追踪准粒子轨迹，并模拟了热平衡态下的准粒子运动。
AI.result: 数值上验证了准粒子存在布朗运动，同时标记粒子的扩散常数与TBA理论预测吻合。
AI.conclusion: 该数值方案可推广至其他具有Lax矩阵的经典多粒子模型，为研究可积系统中的输运现象提供了新工具。

title: Fermi-Level-Dependent Defect Chemistry and Oxygen Evolution Reaction Activity of Fe-Doped and Oxygen-Deficient \ce{SrTiO3}(001)
summary: The oxygen evolution reaction (OER) on perovskite oxides is controlled by the interplay of dopant chemistry, defect charge states, and surface segregation, yet these factors are rarely treated on equal footing. Using first-principles density functional theory, we investigate how Fe dopants (\FeTi{}) and oxygen vacancies (\VO{}) in different charge states affect the OER on TiO$_2$-terminated \ce{SrTiO3}(001). We combine charge-dependent defect formation energies, segregation energies, and charge transition levels with OER free-energy profiles obtained in the computational hydrogen electrode framework. Neutral \FeTix{} preserves near-pristine activity, with overpotentials of $0.43$--$0.48$~V compared to $0.45$~V for the pristine surface, whereas the reduced states \FeTip{} and \FeTipp{} raise the overpotential to as much as $1.35$~V when intermediates bind to Ti sites adjacent to surface Fe. Oxygen vacancies segregate to the surface across the entire band gap ($ΔE_\mathrm{seg} = -0.50$ to $-0.80$~eV) but do not improve the activity: \VOx{} and \VOp{} overstabilize oxygenated intermediates ($η$ up to $2.13$~V), and only \VOpp{} retains a balanced pathway ($η= 0.45$~V in the bulk-like region). Because the stable charge state and the segregation tendency of each defect are set by the Fermi level, the OER overpotential itself becomes a Fermi-level-dependent quantity. These results establish Fermi-level engineering as a framework for assessing and tuning defect-mediated OER activity in perovskite oxides.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算，系统研究了Fe掺杂和氧空位在不同电荷态下对SrTiO₃(001)表面析氧反应（OER）的影响，发现缺陷的电荷态和表面偏析行为由费米能级决定，进而使OER过电位成为费米能级依赖的量，提出了"费米能级工程"作为调控钙钛矿氧化物缺陷介导OER活性的框架。
AI.motivation: 析氧反应（OER）中，掺杂剂化学性质、缺陷电荷态和表面偏析三者相互作用，但以往研究很少将它们放在同等重要位置综合考虑。
AI.method: 基于第一性原理密度泛函理论，结合电荷依赖的缺陷形成能、偏析能、电荷跃迁能级，以及计算氢电极框架下的OER自由能分布。
AI.result: 中性Fe掺杂保持近本征活性（过电位0.43-0.48 V vs. 本征0.45 V），而还原态Fe掺杂使过电位升至1.35 V；氧空位表面偏析倾向强（-0.50至-0.80 eV）但不改善活性，仅双电离态氧空位保持平衡路径（0.45 V）。
AI.conclusion: OER过电位是费米能级依赖的量，提出"费米能级工程"作为评估和调控钙钛矿氧化物缺陷介导OER活性的框架。

title: Tuning superconductivity and charge density wave order by next-nearest-neighbor hopping integral in honeycomb Holstein model
comment: 7 pages, 9 figures. Published version in Physical Review B
summary:
By using unbiased determinant quantum Monte Carlo simulations, we investigate the interplay between superconductivity and charge density wave order in the Holstein model on a honeycomb lattice with next-nearest-neighbor hopping \(t^{\prime}\).
  We find that a finite negative \(t^{\prime}\) enhances \(s\)-wave superconducting pairing susceptibility near the van Hove fillings in the weak electron-phonon coupling regime, while it suppresses superconductivity and promotes charge density wave order at intermediate electron-phonon coupling strengths.
  The effect of \(t^{\prime}\) on a charge density wave is filling-dependent: It suppresses the charge density wave at half filling but enhances it near the van Hove singularities.
  A spectral analysis reveals the opening of a gap at low temperatures, highlighting the competitive relationship between superconducting and charge density wave orders mediated by electron-phonon coupling and tuned by \(t^{\prime}\).

AI.tldr: 本文通过 unbiased 行列式量子蒙特卡洛模拟，研究了蜂巢晶格 Holstein 模型中次近邻跳跃 t′ 对超导与电荷密度波之间竞争关系的调控作用。
AI.motivation: 探究蜂巢晶格 Holstein 模型中次近邻跳跃 t′ 如何影响超导与电荷密度波序之间的竞争关系，特别是在不同电子-声子耦合强度下。
AI.method: 使用 unbiased 行列式量子蒙特卡洛模拟方法，研究具有次近邻跳跃 t′ 的蜂巢晶格 Holstein 模型。
AI.result: (1) 弱耦合区：负 t′ 增强 van Hove 填充附近的 s 波超导配对磁化率；(2) 中等耦合：t′ 抑制超导，促进 CDW 序；(3) t′ 对 CDW 的影响依赖于填充：半满时抑制，van Hove 奇异点附近增强；(4) 低温下能隙打开，揭示超导与 CDW 之间的竞争关系。
AI.conclusion: t′ 是调控电子-声子耦合介导的超导与 CDW 之间竞争的一个关键参数，其效应具有填充依赖性和耦合强度依赖性。

title: Thermodynamics of 2-undecanone + n-alkane mixtures
summary: Densities and excess molar volumes ($V_{\text{m}}^{\text{E}}$) at (293.15-303.15) K and excess molar enthalpies ($H_{\text{m}}^{\text{E}}$) at 298.15 K are reported for 2-undecanone + heptane, or + octane, or + decane, or + dodecane, or + tetradecane mixtures at 95 kPa. Densities and $H_{\text{m}}^{\text{E}}$ were measured using, respectively, a densitometer Anton Paar DMA 602 and a Tian-Calvet micro-calorimeter. $H_{\text{m}}^{\text{E}}$ results are positive, indicating that interactions between like molecules are dominant. Both $H_{\text{m}}^{\text{E}}$ and $V_{\text{m}}^{\text{E}}$ increase in line with $n$ (number of C atoms of the alkane), which reveals that the increase of $V_{\text{m}}^{\text{E}}$ can be ascribed to an increased interactional contribution. Nevertheless, systems with $n$ = 7,8 show negative $V_{\text{m}}^{\text{E}}$ values, which reveals that $V_{\text{m}}^{\text{E}}$ is determined mainly by structural effects. Isochoric excess molar internal energies ($U_{V\text{m}}^{\text{E}}$) at 298.15 K have been obtained from the present $H_{\text{m}}^{\text{E}}$ and $V_{\text{m}}^{\text{E}}$ data. At equimolar composition, $U_{V\text{m}}^{\text{E}}$is nearly constant for $n$ = 7-10, and then slightly increases. This has been explained in terms of a possible folding of 2-undecanone. From the comparison of $U_{V\text{m}}^{\text{E}}$ results for similar systems involving n-alkanoates, it is shown that folding is more likely in solutions with these compounds.

AI.tldr: 本文报告了2-十一酮与五种正构烷烃（庚烷至十四烷）混合体系的过量摩尔体积（V_m^E）和过量摩尔焓（H_m^E）数据，分析了分子间相互作用和结构效应对热力学性质的影响。
AI.motivation: 研究2-十一酮与不同链长正构烷烃混合体系的热力学性质，揭示分子间相互作用、结构效应以及可能的分子折叠行为。
AI.method: 使用Anton Paar DMA 602密度计测量密度及过量摩尔体积，Tian-Calvet微量热计测量过量摩尔焓，并通过热力学关系推导出等容过量摩尔内能（U_{V_m}^E）。
AI.result: H_m^E均为正值，表明同类分子间相互作用占主导；H_m^E和V_m^E均随烷烃碳原子数n增加而增大；n=7,8时V_m^E为负值；等摩尔组成下U_{V_m}^E在n=7-10时几乎恒定，后略有增加。
AI.conclusion: 结构效应决定短链体系（n=7,8）的负V_m^E，而长链时相互作用贡献增大；U_{V_m}^E的变化归因于2-十一酮可能的分子折叠行为，且与正构烷酸酯体系相比，折叠更易发生在后者中。

title: Coupled-cluster study of dynamic Jahn-Teller effect in a $5d^2$ W antifluorite
summary: In correlated insulators, the interplay among coexisting charge, spin, orbital, and lattice degrees of freedom gives rise to rich quantum phenomena, while unraveling the interplay is not straightforward. In the family of cubic $5d^2$ double perovskites, the ground spin-orbit coupled electronic states of $5d$ metal sites are degenerate and couple to the Jahn-Teller active vibrations, whereas no experimental evidence of the symmetry-lowering in the low-temperature ordered phases has been reported. To quantitatively unravel the nature of $5d^2$ centers, we apply equation-of-motion coupled cluster (EOM-CC) theory to analyze the vibronic and magnetic properties of $5d^2$ W sites of Cs$_2$WCl$_6$. We derive the electronic and vibronic model Hamiltonians, calculate the W $L_3$ edge resonant inelastic x-ray scattering (RIXS) spectra, and determine the effective magnetic moment. The simulated RIXS spectra show that vibronic coupling makes several peaks asymmetric. The effective magnetic moments exhibit a temperature dependence similar to that observed experimentally, confirming the validity of the calculated distribution of low-energy levels. Our calculations indicate that the Jahn-Teller effect in Cs$_2$WCl$_6$ is in a weak regime, and noticeable deformation would not occur, whereas the dynamic Jahn-Teller effect modulates the shapes of the RIXS spectra and affects the magnetic moment. This work demonstrates the usefulness of the EOM-CC method for predicting physical phenomena on metal sites in correlated insulating materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过方程运动耦合簇（EOM-CC）理论分析了Cs₂WCl₆中5d² W位的振动耦合和磁性质，揭示了弱Jahn-Teller效应下振动耦合对RIXS谱和磁矩的影响，并验证了EOM-CC方法在关联绝缘体材料研究中的实用性。
AI.motivation: 在关联绝缘体中，电荷、自旋、轨道和晶格自由度之间的相互作用会产生丰富的量子现象，但解析这些相互作用并不直接。对于立方5d²双钙钛矿家族，5d金属位点的基态自旋-轨道耦合电子态简并并与Jahn-Teller活性振动耦合，然而实验中尚未发现低温有序相中对称性降低的证据。因此需要定量揭示5d²中心的本质。
AI.method: 应用方程运动耦合簇（EOM-CC）理论分析Cs₂WCl₆中5d² W位的振动耦合和磁性质。推导了电子和振动模型哈密顿量，计算了W L₃边共振非弹性X射线散射（RIXS）谱，并确定了有效磁矩。
AI.result: 模拟的RIXS谱显示振动耦合导致多个峰不对称；有效磁矩的温度依赖性与实验观察一致，验证了低能级分布计算的正确性；计算表明Cs₂WCl₆中的Jahn-Teller效应处于弱耦合区域，不会发生明显形变，但动态Jahn-Teller效应会调制RIXS谱的形状并影响磁矩。
AI.conclusion: 该工作证明了EOM-CC方法在预测关联绝缘体材料中金属位点的物理现象方面具有实用价值。

title: Atomic Design Transformer: xTB-Validated 3D Molecule Generation from Scaffolds
summary: We present an SE(3)-invariant transformer for 3D-molecule generation, the Atomic Design Transformer (ADT). ADT places atoms one at a time, autoregressively. The SE(3) invariance is achieved by tokenization: each new atom's position is encoded in a local coordinate frame of a previously placed atom. The network is a plain causal transformer. For evaluation, we introduce xTB-Validated Rate (XVR), which checks whether the molecular topology is preserved after xTB GFN2 geometry relaxation. On QM9, ADT is competitive with state-of-the-art baselines. For GEOM-Drugs, we present a quantitative benchmark of scaffold-conditional 3D generation, evaluating seven scaffolds (benzene, pyridine, pyrimidine, pyrazine, furan, thiophene, cyclohexane) on the 30-atom-truncated ground-state GEOM-Drugs dataset. XVR ranges from 11.1% (pyrazine) to 29.7% (benzene), all from a single trained model. The generated molecules are chemically diverse, and generation is fast by virtue of the plain causal-transformer backbone. Application to the 50-atom-truncated GEOM-Drugs dataset yields lower XVR while the per-bond and per-angle quality is retained. These results position ADT as a practical proposer for in silico molecular design.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种SE(3)不变的原子设计变换器（ADT），通过自回归方式逐个放置原子并使用局部坐标系编码位置，在分子生成任务上展现出竞争力，并引入XVR评估指标。
AI.motivation: 现有3D分子生成方法在保持SE(3)不变性、生成效率以及拓扑结构保真度方面存在不足，缺乏有效的评估指标来验证分子生成后的几何稳定性。
AI.method: 提出ADT模型：采用自回归方式逐个放置原子；通过tokenization将每个新原子位置编码在已放置原子的局部坐标系中实现SE(3)不变性；使用普通因果变换器作为网络骨干；引入xTB GFN2几何弛豫后的XVR评估指标。
AI.result: 在QM9上与SOTA竞争；在GEOM-Drugs的7种支架条件生成中，XVR范围11.1%-29.7%；单模型即可完成所有支架生成；生成速度快且分子多样；50原子截断数据集上XVR下降但键角和键长质量保持。
AI.conclusion: ADT作为一种实用的分子设计提议器，在生成效率、分子多样性和几何保真度方面表现良好，适用于计算机辅助分子设计。

title: Valley Valves at Domain Walls in Symmetry-Broken Rhombohedral Graphene
comment: Comments are very appreciated; 7 + 37 pages, 5 + 18 figures
summary: Rhombohedral multilayer graphene polarized by a moderate perpendicular displacement field hosts a time-reversal-symmetry-breaking valley-and-spin-polarized metallic phase that may condense into a chiral superconductor. Recent magnetic imaging and transport measurements in this unconventional system suggest the presence of domain walls both in the metallic and superconducting phases. In this work, we show that valley domain walls are impenetrable barriers to transport in the metallic regime. Transmission through such a domain wall must therefore be mediated by intervalley interactions. We derive the symmetry-allowed terms and show via microscopic numerical simulations that they enable the transmission of electrons across the domain wall. In the superconducting phase, we find that intervalley mixing is crucial for supporting an appreciable supercurrent through a SNS' Josephson junction that connects opposite-chirality superconducting regions. Taken together, our work elucidates the nature of domain walls in these experimentally relevant multilayer systems and emphasizes the critical role of intervalley hybridization plays in governing their transport properties.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了菱面体多层石墨烯中谷畴壁的输运性质，发现在金属态中谷畴壁是不可穿透的屏障，必须通过谷间相互作用实现电子传输；在超导态中，谷间混合对维持相反手性超导区域之间的超电流至关重要。
AI.motivation: 最近在菱面体多层石墨烯中发现了金属相和超导相中的畴壁，但对其输运性质的理解尚不充分，迫切需要阐明畴壁如何影响系统的电输运行为。
AI.method: 从对称性分析出发推导了允许的谷间相互作用项，并通过微观数值模拟验证了这些项在畴壁处传输电子的能力；对于超导相，研究了SNS'约瑟夫森结中谷间混合对超电流的影响。
AI.result: 谷畴壁在金属态中是不可穿透的，必须依靠谷间相互作用才能实现电子传输；谷间混合在超导相中对于支撑可观超电流至关重要。
AI.conclusion: 该工作阐明了实验相关多层石墨烯系统中畴壁的本质，强调了谷间杂化在调控输运性质中的关键作用。

title: Entropic Necks, Dynamic Crossovers, and Fragility in Supercooled Liquids
summary: The dramatic slowdown of dynamics in supercooled liquids is accompanied by a sequence of dynamical crossovers, most notably the transition from high-temperature collision-dominated transport to low-temperature activated structural relaxation. A particularly striking manifestation of this change is the crossover from Rosenfeld excess-entropy scaling to the Adam--Gibbs relation. In this work we develop a theoretical framework based on a configuration-space extension of Zwanzig's entropic-neck picture and combine it with a Mori--Zwanzig memory-function formalism to address anomalies of supercooled liquids. The central idea is that structural relaxation is controlled by the narrowing of configurational pathways connecting metastable basins of the inherent-structure landscape. Starting from coupled slow variables describing intrabasin motion and neck fluctuations, we derive a reduced generalized Langevin description in which elimination of the neck coordinate generates a long-lived memory kernel and naturally leads to entropy-controlled activated dynamics. At high temperatures the neck is broad and readily accessible, yielding Rosenfeld-type transport governed primarily by local structural entropy. Upon cooling, progressive neck constriction produces an increasing entropy deficit, leading to Adam--Gibbs behavior and activated relaxation. Within this picture, fragility acquires a simple geometric interpretation: fragile liquids are characterized by a rapid collapse of the effective configurational neck with decreasing temperature, whereas strong liquids exhibit a much slower evolution of accessible pathways. The framework does not by itself compute the configurational entropy, mismatch penalty, or cooperative length from microscopic interactions; its aim is to provide a dynamical and geometrical interpretation.

AI.tldr: 本文基于构型空间的Zwanzig熵颈图像与Mori-Zwanzig记忆函数形式，发展了一个理论框架来解释过冷液体的动力学异常，特别是从Rosenfeld过剩熵标度到Adam-Gibbs关系的交叉，以及脆性(fragility)的几何解释。
AI.motivation: 过冷液体中存在从高温碰撞主导输运到低温激活结构弛豫的动力学交叉，尤其是Rosenfeld过剩熵标度到Adam-Gibbs关系的转变尚未有统一的理论解释。
AI.method: 将Zwanzig熵颈图像扩展至构型空间，结合Mori-Zwanzig记忆函数形式，从描述盆地内运动和颈涨落的耦合慢变量出发，推导出约化广义Langevin描述，其中消除颈坐标产生长寿命记忆核，自然导出熵控激活动力学。
AI.result: 高温下颈宽且易通达，产生Rosenfeld型输运；降温时颈收缩导致熵亏，呈现Adam-Gibbs行为。脆性获得几何解释：脆性液体有效构型颈随温度快速坍塌，强液体则演化缓慢。
AI.conclusion: 该框架提供了过冷液体动力学交叉和脆性的动力学与几何解释，但不从微观相互作用计算构型熵、错配惩罚或协同长度。

title: Complementary Thermodynamic Mechanisms of Boron and Carbon Segregation at Grain Boundaries in Nickel Alloys
summary: Grain boundary stabilization by light interstitials is central to the performance of Ni-based superalloys, yet the thermodynamic mechanisms governing their interactions with substitutional chemistry remain poorly resolved. Here, we use hybrid Monte Carlo molecular dynamics simulations to quantify how boron and carbon modify the thermodynamic, structural, and chemical ordering of grain boundaries in Ni--Cr alloys. By analyzing interfacial state variables, site-resolved segregation spectra, local chemical ordering, and structural evolution, we show that boron and carbon stabilize grain boundaries through complementary pathways. Carbon drives saturation-controlled stabilization by recruiting Cr and conditioning boundary chemistry, while suppressing temperature-driven structural transformations of the boundary. In contrast, boron stabilizes grain boundaries through a selective mechanism that lowers the interfacial grand potential via localized ordering while permitting gradual structural evolution. These effects arise from coupled interactions between interstitial segregation and Cr redistribution, which together regulate site accessibility, chemical competition, and the range of accessible interfacial states. This work provides a thermodynamic framework for grain boundary engineering and suggests design principles for leveraging interstitial-substitutional interactions in alloys.

AI.tldr: 通过混合蒙特卡洛分子动力学模拟，揭示了硼和碳通过不同机制稳定Ni-Cr合金晶界：碳通过饱和度控制招募铬并抑制结构转变，硼通过选择性有序化降低界面势能，为晶界工程提供了热力学框架。
AI.motivation: 轻元素间隙原子对镍基高温合金晶界稳定至关重要，但其与替代原子之间的热力学相互作用机制尚不清楚。
AI.method: 采用混合蒙特卡洛分子动力学模拟，定量分析硼和碳对Ni-Cr合金晶界热力学、结构和化学有序化的影响。
AI.result: 碳通过饱和度控制机制招募铬并改变晶界化学，抑制温度驱动的结构转变；硼通过选择性有序化降低界面势能，同时允许逐步结构演化。
AI.conclusion: 提出了晶界工程的热力学框架，为利用间隙-替代原子相互作用设计合金提供了指导原则。

title: Non-stationary longitudinal Josephson effect in electron-hole bilayers
summary: The non-stationary longitudinal Josephson effect in bilayer systems with pairing of spatially separated electrons and holes is investigated. The tunneling current between two (right and left) weakly coupled electron-hole condensates is analyzed in the presence of an external voltage applied along the layers. Two limiting regimes are considered: the high-density regime, where pairing occurs in momentum space similarly to conventional superconductors, and the low-density regime corresponding to a Bose-Einstein condensate of spatially indirect excitons. Using the tunneling Hamiltonian approach, expressions for the quasiparticle, superconducting and interference contributions to the tunneling current are derived. It is shown that in the high-density limit the quasiparticle and interference currents vanish at zero temperature below a threshold voltage determined by the energy gap, so that only the supercurrent remains. In contrast, in the low-density regime the gapless spectrum of collective excitations leads to finite dissipative contributions even at zero temperature, resulting in damping of Josephson oscillations. For spatially separated tunneling barriers with distance exceeding the coherence length, phase jumps occur at each barrier, resulting in voltage oscillations across the electron and hole barriers and a non-sinusoidal current-phase relation governed by the critical currents of the two barriers.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了双层系统中空间分离的电子-空穴配对体系的非稳态纵向约瑟夫森效应，分析了高密度（类超导BCS态）和低密度（玻色-爱因斯坦凝聚激子态）两种极限情形下的隧穿电流特性，揭示了不同密度 regime 下约瑟夫森振荡的阻尼行为和非正弦电流-相位关系。
AI.motivation: 理解非平衡态下空间分离电子-空穴对凝聚体的隧穿输运行为，特别是高低密度 regime 转换时约瑟夫森效应的定性差异及其物理机制。
AI.method: 采用隧穿哈密顿量方法，推导了准粒子、超导和干涉三项对隧穿电流的贡献，分别分析高密度（动量空间配对）和低密度（实空间激子BEC）两种极限情形。
AI.result: 高密度极限下，零温时低于阈值的准粒子和干涉电流消失，仅有超流存在；低密度极限下，集体激发谱无能隙，即使在零温也存在耗散贡献，导致约瑟夫森振荡被阻尼。空间分离的双势垒结构导致相位跳跃和电压振荡，电流-相位关系由两个势垒的临界电流共同决定，呈非正弦形式。
AI.conclusion: 电子-空穴配对体系的约瑟夫森效应强烈依赖于配对密度 regime：高密度区呈现类似超导体的无耗散超流行为，而低密度区因无能隙激发始终存在耗散，且多势垒几何结构可产生丰富的非线性动力学现象。

title: Local, mm-scale $^1$H magnetic resonance imaging using atomic vapors
summary: We demonstrate a practical and sensitive low-field approach to magnetic resonance imaging (MRI) of $μ$L-scale samples using an optically pumped magnetometer (OPM). Using a simple setup where a commercial OPM is placed directly adjacent to a sample, without intermediary signal-pickup coils, we perform one- and two-dimensional imaging with a >1 cm field of view and sub-mm Fourier-limited resolution at 10 $μ$T, near earth's field. This enables (i) high-throughput, low-field MRI of fluidic and tissue samples, and (ii) a quantitative benchmark of the sensitive volume surrounding the OPM.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了一种利用光泵磁力计（OPM）在极低磁场（10 μT）下对微升级样本进行MRI成像的实用方法，无需信号拾取线圈，实现了亚毫米级分辨率和大视野成像。
AI.motivation: 传统高场MRI设备昂贵、体积大，且对微升级样本的灵敏度和分辨率有限。作者希望探索一种低成本、低场强、高灵敏度的替代方案，利用OPM直接检测核磁共振信号，实现微流控和组织样本的高通量MRI成像。
AI.method: 将商业OPM直接放置在样本旁边（无中间信号拾取线圈），在10 μT（接近地磁场）的低场环境下进行一维和二维成像。使用傅里叶编码实现分辨率限制，无需超导磁体或复杂屏蔽系统。
AI.result: 实现了>1 cm的视野和亚毫米级傅里叶极限分辨率；成功对流体和组织样本进行了低场MRI成像；定量表征了OPM周围的灵敏体积分布。
AI.conclusion: 该低场OPM-MRI方法为微升级样本的高通量成像提供了一种简单、灵敏、经济的方案，有望推动低场MRI在生物医学和微流控领域的实际应用。

title: Stabilizing Itinerant Electrons in a Corner-Sharing Kagomé Oxide Nd4Os3ZnO14
summary: Kagome oxides provide a fertile platform for exploring exotic electronic states arising from geometrical frustration and characteristic band topology. Here, we report the synthesis of a 5d transition-metal kagome oxide, Nd4Os3ZnO14, obtained via high-temperature, high-pressure hydrothermal synthesis. Single-crystal X-ray diffraction reveals a two-dimensional kagome network formed by corner-sharing OsO6 octahedra, with a nominal osmium valence of +4.67. In-plane resistivity and hard X-ray photoelectron spectroscopy measurements indicate that the semimetallic electronic structure at room temperature evolves into a semiconducting ground state upon cooling, accompanied by a pronounced enhancement of hole mobility. Magnetic susceptibility measurements demonstrate localized Nd3+ moments without long-range magnetic order down to 2 K. The coexistence of a metallic kagome plane, strong spin-orbit coupling inherent to 5d electrons, and rare-earth magnetism establishes Nd4Os3ZnO14 as a promising platform for investigating correlated electron phenomena in kagome oxides within the itinerant regime.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了一种新型5d过渡金属Kagome氧化物Nd4Os3ZnO14的合成，该材料在高温高压水热条件下制备。其具有二维Kagome网络结构，室温下半金属特性随冷却转变为半导体态，并伴随空穴迁移率显著增强。磁性测量显示局域Nd3+磁矩但无长程磁序。该材料为研究Kagome氧化物中的关联电子现象提供了新平台。
AI.motivation: Kagome氧化物因其几何阻挫和能带拓扑特性，是探索奇异电子态的重要平台。然而，5d过渡金属Kagome氧化物的研究尚不充分，尤其是同时具有强自旋-轨道耦合和稀土磁性的体系。本文旨在合成这类新材料并揭示其电子结构演化。
AI.method: 采用高温高压水热合成法制备Nd4Os3ZnO14单晶；通过单晶X射线衍射确定晶体结构；利用面内电阻率和硬X射线光电子能谱表征电子结构随温度的变化；通过磁化率测量研究磁性质。
AI.result: 成功合成新型Kagome氧化物；结构为二维Kagome网络（OsO6八面体共角连接），Os名义价态+4.67；室温下半金属性，降温后转变为半导体态，空穴迁移率显著增强；存在局域Nd3+磁矩，2K以下无长程磁序。
AI.conclusion: Nd4Os3ZnO14同时具备金属性Kagome平面、5d电子的强自旋-轨道耦合以及稀土磁性，为在巡游电子体系中研究Kagome氧化物的关联电子现象提供了有前景的平台。

title: Contrastive learning of dynamical representations for enhanced molecular sampling
summary: Identifying collective variables that capture slow dynamical modes is essential for sampling rare events in complex systems. Existing machine-learning approaches often require predefined metastable states, carefully chosen descriptors, or training trajectories with high-quality kinetic information. Here, we introduce SelfTICA, a self-supervised contrastive-learning framework that reformulates collective-variable discovery as dynamical representation learning. SelfTICA defines positive and negative pairs from time-lagged molecular configurations, learns reusable features through a contrastive objective linked to spectral variational principles, and extracts orthogonal slow modes by applying time-lagged independent component analysis in the learned representation space. By decoupling representation learning from slow-mode extraction, SelfTICA avoids direct optimization of eigendecomposition-based objectives and enables spectra and collective variables to be evaluated across lag times without retraining. Across different atomistic systems, SelfTICA learns dynamical representations from limited, biased, or exploratory data and converts them into collective variables that accelerate rare-event exploration and improve free-energy convergence.

AI.tldr: SelfTICA结合自监督对比学习与时间滞后独立成分分析，从分子构象中学习集体变量，无需预定义亚稳态或动力学轨迹，能处理有限、有偏或探索性数据，加速稀有事件采样和自由能收敛。
AI.motivation: 现有机器学习方法发现集体变量时需预定义亚稳态、精心选择描述符或高质量动力学轨迹，限制其适用性。作者希望提出一种无监督、低数据要求的框架，从数据自身的时间结构学习慢变模式。
AI.method: 提出SelfTICA框架：(1) 从时间滞后分子构象中定义正负样本对；(2) 采用对比学习目标（关联谱变分原理）学习可重用特征；(3) 在学到的表示空间应用时间滞后独立成分分析（TICA）提取正交慢模式。将表示学习与慢模式提取解耦，无需针对特征分解目标直接优化。
AI.result: 在不同原子系统上，SelfTICA能从有限、有偏或探索性数据中学习动力学表示，并转化为集体变量，加速稀有事件探索，改善自由能收敛。
AI.conclusion: SelfTICA通过解耦表示学习与慢模式提取，在不重新训练的情况下可在不同滞后时间评估谱和集体变量，为复杂系统的稀有事件采样提供了灵活、高效的方案。

title: Oxidation-induced ultrafast spin-to-orbital conversion at heavy-metal interfaces
summary: Oxidation engineering provides a route to control orbital degrees of freedom, yet its role in spin-to-orbital conversion remains largely unexplored. Here, we report an efficient spin-to-orbital conversion mechanism driven by interfacial oxidation at heavy-metal interfaces. In W/Co/SiO2 heterostructures, terahertz emission exhibits a time delay that scales linearly with the W thickness, identifying orbital-current transport as the dominant origin. The emission amplitude is approximately three times larger than that of Co/Pt bilayers, indicating highly efficient conversion from spin to orbital angular momentum. Systematic variation of Co thickness, stoichiometry, and interface configuration reveals that the effect originates from oxidation of the W layer at the W/Co interface, which modulates the interfacial orbital texture. We further show that this mechanism is generic across different heavy metals and scales with their spin-orbit coupling strength. These results establish oxidation as an effective handle to engineer spin-to-orbital conversion and provide a general route toward orbitronic terahertz emitters.

AI.tldr: 本文发现通过界面氧化工程可以在重金属界面实现高效的自旋-轨道转换，在W/Co/SiO2异质结构中观察到太赫兹发射的时间延迟与W厚度线性相关，表明轨道电流输运是主导机制，发射幅度比Co/Pt双层结构大三倍，证明了氧化可有效调控自旋-轨道转换，为轨道电子学太赫兹发射器提供通用路径。
AI.motivation: 氧化工程虽可控制轨道自由度，但其在自旋-轨道转换中的作用尚未被充分探索，本文旨在揭示界面氧化驱动的高效自旋-轨道转换机制。
AI.method: 通过构建W/Co/SiO2异质结构，测量太赫兹发射的时间延迟与W厚度的线性关系，系统变化Co厚度、化学计量比和界面构型，探究氧化对W/Co界面轨道纹理的调控作用，并在不同重金属体系中验证其普适性。
AI.result: 太赫兹发射时间延迟与W厚度线性相关，表明轨道电流输运主导；发射幅度约为Co/Pt双层结构的三倍，表明自旋-轨道转换效率高；机制源于W/Co界面处W层的氧化调控界面轨道纹理，且在不同重金属中具有普适性，与自旋-轨道耦合强度成比例。
AI.conclusion: 氧化工程可有效调控自旋-轨道转换，为轨道电子学太赫兹发射器提供通用设计路线。

title: Self-Consistent Closure of Fractal Dimension, Nonextensive Statistics, and Non-Markovian Dynamics in Critical Systems
summary: Self-organized critical systems often exhibit three macroscopic features simultaneously: nonextensive thermodynamics (quantified by the Tsallis index $q$), structural fractality (measured by the Hausdorff dimension $D$), and non-Markovian dynamics (characterized by the memory exponent $α$). Historically, these parameters have been treated as independent, to be empirically fitted case by case. Here we demonstrate that phase-space self-consistency imposes a unique algebraic closure: $α=D/(2D-1)$. This relation, together with $q=1+1/D$ derived from the extensivity of Tsallis entropy on fractal supports, yields the known result $α=1/(3-q)$ as a consequence, not as an independent assumption. The closure contains no free parameters and satisfies the physical boundary conditions $α(1)=1$ (ballistic transport in Euclidean spaces) and $α\to1/2$ as $D\to\infty$ (maximally subdiffusive regime). We validate the Troika relation across eight independent experimental systems, including seismicity, electromagnetic precursors, EEG, urban networks, botanical architectures, and space plasma. All measured values fall within error bars of the theoretical prediction, establishing the universality of the closure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出并验证了一个普适的三参数（Tsallis指数q、Hausdorff维数D、记忆指数α）闭合关系α=D/(2D-1)，该关系源于相空间自洽性，且可通过q=1+1/D推导出已知结果α=1/(3-q)，并在八个不同实验系统中得到验证。
AI.motivation: 过去自组织临界系统中的三个宏观特征参数（q、D、α）被视为相互独立、需要分别拟合的经验参数，缺乏理论上的内在联系。本文旨在证明它们之间存在由相空间自洽性决定的唯一代数闭合关系。
AI.method: 通过相空间自洽性推导出α=D/(2D-1)的解析关系，并结合Tsallis熵在分形支撑上的广延性得到q=1+1/D，进而推导出α=1/(3-q)。在八个独立实验系统（地震活动、电磁前兆、脑电图、城市网络、植物结构、空间等离子体等）中进行验证。
AI.result: 理论预测的Troika关系（α=D/(2D-1)）在所有八个实验系统中均得到验证，测量值均落在理论预测的误差范围内。该关系满足物理边界条件：α(1)=1（欧几里得空间中的弹道输运）和α→∞时α→1/2（最大亚扩散情形）。
AI.conclusion: 该闭合关系无自由参数，具有普适性，将三个看似独立的宏观特征统一为一个自洽的理论框架，揭示了自组织临界系统的深层内在结构。

title: Ternary-composition tuning of the anomalous Nernst effect in amorphous-like Gd-Co-Pt films
summary: We report composition tuning of the anomalous Nernst effect in amorphous-like Gd-Co-Pt ternary films. Pt incorporation into Gd-Co films modifies the anomalous Nernst coefficient and induces a sign reversal of S_ANE, whereas Gd incorporation into Co-Pt films suppresses S_ANE but reduces thermal conductivity. Owing to the balance between transverse thermoelectric response and thermal transport, the heat-flux sensitivity reaches approximately 0.24 μm/A. Composition maps reveal that the magnitude and heat-flux sensitivity of the anomalous Nernst effect can be systematically tuned in the Gd-Co-Pt ternary composition space. This work extends ANE material design from binary-alloy optimization to ternary-composition engineering.

AI.tldr: 本文报道了非晶态Gd-Co-Pt三元薄膜中异常能斯特效应的组分调控。通过Pt掺入Gd-Co薄膜改变了异常能斯特系数并引起符号反转，而Gd掺入Co-Pt薄膜则抑制了该效应但降低了热导率。在热电响应与热输运平衡下，热流灵敏度达到约0.24 μm/A。组分图显示该效应可在三元空间中系统调控，将ANE材料设计从二元合金优化扩展到三元组分工程。
AI.motivation: 将异常能斯特效应的材料设计从传统的二元合金优化拓展到三元组分空间，探索更丰富的调控自由度。
AI.method: 通过组分调控制备非晶态Gd-Co-Pt三元薄膜，系统研究Pt掺入Gd-Co和Gd掺入Co-Pt对异常能斯特系数、热导率和热流灵敏度的影响，绘制组分图。
AI.result: Pt掺入导致异常能斯特系数符号反转；Gd掺入抑制效应但降低热导率；热流灵敏度达约0.24 μm/A；三元组分空间可实现系统调控。
AI.conclusion: 本研究将ANE材料设计从二元优化扩展到三元组分工程，为热电材料的设计提供了新思路。

title: Vortex-core size and quantum geometry in flat-band superconductors
summary: We investigate the real-space vortex structure of a flat-band superconductor described by the attractive Hubbard model on the Mielke checkerboard lattice. Using a momentum-space mean-field analysis, we derive a closed-form expression for the coherence length in terms of the quantum metric of the Bloch states and a particle-hole-symmetric pair density. Self-consistent Bogoliubov-de Gennes calculations on a finite disk confirm this prediction across a wide range of fillings and interaction strengths. The coherence length is minimized at half filling, diverges toward both band edges as the pair density vanishes, and depends only logarithmically on the interaction strength. These features differ qualitatively from the conventional BCS picture, which relies on a well-defined Fermi surface and a kinetic mechanism for pair transport. Instead, the vortex-core size is governed by a geometric pair mass arising from virtual interband processes encoded in the quantum metric. Our results establish the vortex core as a direct real-space manifestation of flat-band quantum geometry.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了Mielke棋盘晶格上平带超导体的涡旋结构，发现相干长度由布洛赫态的量子度量决定，在半填充时最小，向能带边缘发散，仅对数依赖于相互作用强度，与常规BCS理论定性不同。
AI.motivation: 探究平带超导体中涡旋结构的真实空间特征，特别是量子度量如何影响涡旋核心尺寸，以揭示平带量子几何在真实空间的物理表现。
AI.method: 采用动量空间平均场分析推导出相干长度关于量子度量和粒子-空穴对称对密度的闭式表达式，并在有限圆盘上进行自洽Bogoliubov-de Gennes计算验证。
AI.result: 相干长度在半填充时最小，向能带边缘发散，仅对数依赖相互作用强度；涡旋核心尺寸由量子度量编码的虚带间过程产生的几何对质量决定。
AI.conclusion: 涡旋核心是平带量子几何的直接真实空间体现，平带超导体的涡旋行为与常规BCS理论有本质区别。

title: High-sensitivity hydrogen gas permeation: system development, sample preparation, and influence of testing variables
summary: There is a need to develop quantitative, high-resolution hydrogen gas (H2) permeation techniques to provide a better understanding of hydrogen-material interactions. This study aims to develop and validate a high-sensitivity H2 permeation system, which is then leveraged to systematically quantify the influence of surface condition and key testing variables (surface oxides, residual gas impurities, pressure, and temperature) on hydrogen permeation. A gas permeation system capable of operating at pressures up to 50 bar and temperatures up to 250 C was developed, incorporating high-sensitivity mass spectrometric detection and controlled surface preparation protocols. Permeation transients were analysed in a model material (annealed pure Fe) to determine hydrogen diffusivity and permeability under systematically varied surface states, oxygen contents, pressures and temperatures. Surface oxides are shown to play a dominant role in controlling hydrogen permeation at room temperature. The presence of oxide layers can severely hinder or completely suppress hydrogen uptake, with measurable permeation requiring oxide removal via pickling and Pd coating on both surfaces, or activation through hydrogen-assisted reduction at elevated temperature. Residual oxygen present prior to hydrogen exposure further reduces permeability by modifying surface boundary conditions, indicating strongly surface-controlled kinetics. Under optimised surface conditions, hydrogen transport follows bulk diffusion-controlled behaviour, with steady-state flux obeying Sieverts' law at 25 C (1-5 bar) and diffusivity and permeability exhibiting Arrhenius behaviour between 25 and 150 C at 5 bar, indicating bulk diffusion-controlled transport. The developed system resolves hydrogen fluxes as low as 1.98x10-9 mol(m2 s) and provides a robust platform for investigating surface, mechanical and environmental effects on H2 permeation.

AI.tldr: 本研究开发并验证了一种高灵敏度氢渗透系统，可在50 bar/250°C下运行。利用退火纯铁，系统研究了表面氧化物、残余气体杂质、压力和温度对氢渗透的影响。结果表明，表面氧化物在室温下主导氢渗透行为，去除氧化物后氢传输符合体扩散控制，表现出Sieverts'定律和Arrhenius行为。系统可分辨低至1.98×10⁻⁹ mol/(m²·s)的氢通量。
AI.motivation: 目前缺乏定量、高分辨率的氢气渗透技术来深入理解氢与材料的相互作用，因此需要开发高灵敏度的氢渗透系统。
AI.method: 开发了压力达50 bar、温度达250°C的气体渗透系统，集成高灵敏度质谱检测和可控表面制备协议。以退火纯铁为模型材料，系统改变表面状态、氧含量、压力和温度，分析渗透瞬态以确定氢扩散率和渗透率。
AI.result: 表面氧化物室温下主导氢渗透，严重阻碍或完全抑制氢吸收；残余氧进一步降低渗透率；优化表面条件下，氢传输符合体扩散控制，稳态通量符合Sieverts'定律（25°C, 1-5 bar），扩散率和渗透率在25-150°C/5 bar下呈Arrhenius行为。
AI.conclusion: 该高灵敏度系统为研究表面、力学和环境因素对氢渗透的影响提供了稳健平台，能分辨低至1.98×10⁻⁹ mol/(m²·s)的氢通量。

title: Probing Interfacial Magnetic Anisotropy in \texorpdfstring{CoV$_{2}$O$_{4}$}{CoV2O4} using Spin Hall Magnetoresistance
summary: Spin Hall magnetoresistance (SMR) has emerged as a powerful probe for investigating interfacial spin transport and magnetic anisotropy in complex oxide heterostructures. In this work, we investigate the interfacial magnetic anisotropy in Pt/CVO through angle-dependent magnetotransport measurements. Unlike the bulk-sensitive magnetic measurements on both strained CVO and Pt/CVO films, which exhibit a ferrimagnetic transition at $T_{C} \approx 150$ K accompanied by out-of-plane anisotropy that reorients toward in-plane anisotropy below 90 K, SMR reveals a distinct interfacial magnetic anisotropy. The rotational scans of the in-plane transverse SMR at 20 K exhibit substantial hysteresis about [100], while no hysteresis is observed along [110] and [1$\bar{1}$0], indicating a biaxial anisotropy with easy axes along [110] and [1$\bar{1}$0]. Furthermore, the absence of sharp discontinuities in both the in-plane longitudinal and transverse SMR, together with pronounced discontinuities near the in-plane [010] direction during out-of-plane rotation, strongly indicates the presence of in-plane anisotropy. This behavior persists up to 120 K. The discrepancy between the bulk-sensitive magnetic measurements and the SMR response suggests that the Pt/CVO interface retains a magnetic anisotropy distinct from the bulk, highlighting the interfacial sensitivity of SMR. Additionally, the spin mixing conductance is found to be of the order of $10^{14}$ $Ω^{-1}\mathrm{m}^{-2}$, comparable to other oxide-based spintronic systems. These findings highlight the crucial role of interfacial effects in spin transport and establish Pt/CVO as a promising platform for spintronic applications.

AI.tldr: 本文通过自旋霍尔磁电阻（SMR）研究Pt/CVO异质结的界面磁各向异性，发现与体相测量结果不同，界面表现出双轴各向异性（易轴沿[110]和[1\bar{1}0]），且该行为持续至120 K，证实SMR对界面磁性的高敏感性。
AI.motivation: 探究Pt/CVO异质结中界面磁各向异性与体相的区别，揭示界面效应对自旋输运的影响，评估该体系在自旋电子学中的应用潜力。
AI.method: 采用角度依赖的磁输运测量（包括面内纵向/横向SMR和面外旋转SMR）分析Pt/CVO的界面磁各向异性，并与体相磁性测量（应变CVO和Pt/CVO薄膜）进行对比。
AI.result: 1) 体相测量显示铁磁转变温度T_C≈150 K，高温面外各向异性在90 K以下转为面内各向异性。2) SMR显示界面为双轴各向异性，易轴沿[110]和[1\bar{1}0]，而非体相易轴。3) 面内旋转SMR在20 K沿[100]表现显著磁滞，沿[110]无磁滞；面外旋转在[010]方向出现明显不连续。4) 界面各向异性持续至120 K。5) 自旋混合电导~10¹⁴ Ω⁻¹m⁻²。
AI.conclusion: Pt/CVO界面具有与体相不同的磁各向异性，SMR是探测界面磁性的有效手段；该体系的自旋混合电导与其他氧化物自旋电子学体系相当，具备良好的自旋电子学应用前景。

title: Liquid Random Feature Methods for Time-Dependent Partial Differential Equations
summary: A central challenge in mesh-free space--time approximation for time-dependent partial differential equations is to represent evolving temporal scales while keeping residual minimization computationally tractable. Random feature methods simplify this algebraic problem by freezing nonlinear trial functions and fitting only a linear readout, but standard static space--time activations provide no explicit relaxation-scale mechanism, making temporal-scale resolution a finite-dimensional bottleneck in stiff, dispersive, or multi-scale regimes. We introduce liquid random feature methods (L-RFM), which replace static temporal activations by closed-form liquid time-constant responses with sampled relaxation scales. The resulting frozen features form temporally structured local or global trial spaces with analytic space--time derivatives for residual least-squares assembly. A density theorem proves density of the deterministic trial spaces in the continuous space--time function class, and a temporal-rank calculation clarifies the role of sampled relaxation scales. Ablation and finite-feature tests identify the liquid temporal response as the primary source of the observed accuracy improvement. Across stiff reaction--diffusion, nonlinear transport, dispersive, complex-valued, and multidimensional benchmarks, L-RFM improves finite-feature accuracy in regimes where temporal-scale representation controls the approximation. By embedding relaxation scales directly into frozen trial functions, L-RFM provides a route to high-accuracy continuous space--time surrogates for evolutionary PDEs while preserving the simplicity of linear least-squares solvers.

AI.tldr: 本文提出液态随机特征方法（L-RFM），通过将静态时间激活函数替换为具有采样松弛尺度的闭式液态时间常数响应，在保持线性最小二乘求解器简洁性的同时，显著提升了时空逼近方法在刚性、色散及多尺度演化PDE中的精度。
AI.motivation: 传统随机特征方法使用静态时空激活函数，缺乏显式的尺度松弛机制，导致在处理刚性、色散或多尺度问题时，时间尺度分辨率成为有限维瓶颈。
AI.method: 将传统静态时间激活函数替换为具有采样松弛尺度的闭式液态时间常数响应（liquid time-constant responses），形成具有解析时空导数的临时结构化试验空间，用于残差最小二乘组装。
AI.result: 消融实验和有限特征测试表明液态时间响应是精度提升的主要来源；在刚性反应-扩散、非线性输运、色散、复值及多维基准测试中，L-RFM在时间尺度表征起主导作用的场景下显著提高了有限特征精度。
AI.conclusion: 通过将松弛尺度直接嵌入冻结试验函数，L-RFM为演化PDE提供了高精度连续时空代理模型，同时保留了线性最小二乘求解器的简洁性。

title: Creation and motion of antiferromagnetic skyrmions by edge manipulation
summary: Magnetic racetrack architectures that use topological magnetic particles to store information are one of the most promising concepts for future storage applications. Antiferromagnetic racetracks are particularly appealing as they are not susceptible to external magnetic fields. State-of-the-art racetracks use magnetic fields, spin-transfer and spin-orbit torques caused by electric currents to move the bits across the entire circuit. However, the application of currents in many antiferromagnetic racetracks is limited because many of them are insulating. Recently, however, a concept for ferromagnetic racetrack memories that are free of global driving forces has been proposed. It has been demonstrated that various topological entities can be generated and transported over long distances solely through local magnetization rotation at the sample boundaries, independent of global driving forces. Here, we demonstrate that the local rotation of magnetization at the boundary of an antiferromagnetic sample can be exploited in racetracks to efficiently generate and transmit antiferromagnetic skyrmions. Additionally, we demonstrate that local switching of staggered magnetization at the edge of an antiferromagnetic racetrack can be even more successful than the rotational procedure. A comparison of ferromagnetic and antiferromagnetic processing of skyrmionic bits, together with energy considerations, shows that this procedure is fairly efficient in antiferromagnets.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种在反铁磁赛道中通过局部边界磁化旋转或边缘交错磁化开关来产生和传输反铁磁斯格明子的新方法，避免了传统电流驱动方式的限制，且效率较高。
AI.motivation: 现有反铁磁赛道存储器多因绝缘性而无法利用电流驱动，亟需一种无需全局驱动力（如电流）的替代方案来实现信息的生成与传输。
AI.method: 通过局部边界磁化旋转以及边缘交错磁化开关两种方式，在反铁磁赛道中产生并传输反铁磁斯格明子，并与铁磁方案进行对比分析。
AI.result: 两种局部边界操作均可高效产生和传输反铁磁斯格明子，其中边缘交错磁化开关方法比旋转方法效果更优；能量分析表明该方案在反铁磁中效率较高。
AI.conclusion: 局部边界驱动方案可有效替代电流驱动，为绝缘性反铁磁赛道存储提供了可行且高效的新路径。

title: Wavelet Localisation and Local Modulation Freezing in MRW Unwrapping
summary: We develop a localised wavelet formulation of multifractal random walk unwrapping based on the local multiplicative modulation freezing. The framework is motivated by the observation that finite-support wavelet localisation may induce approximate local factorisation of multiplicatively modulated stochastic fields, allowing the modulation component to become effectively frozen within sufficiently localised probing domains. Within this regime, logarithmic wavelet amplitudes admit an approximate additive decomposition linking local wavelet statistics directly to the underlying modulation field. This viewpoint reformulates covariance-based MRW unwrapping as a localised multiscale operator problem in which wavelet coefficients act as finite-support probes of multiplicative organisation. The validity of the approximation depends explicitly on support geometry, scale-dependent overlap, and residual multiscale mixing generated by internal modulation variability. We show that these effects naturally produce finite-scale deviations from ideal logarithmic covariance scaling and lead to structured covariance distortions whose form depends on the interaction between the modulation field and the geometry of the wavelet representation. In the resulting framework, localisation itself becomes the operational mechanism enabling multiscale probing of local stochastic organisation. Numerical investigations using orthonormal wavelet decompositions support the proposed interpretation and demonstrate the emergence of scale-dependent freezing regimes, residual covariance mixing, and finite-support breakdown effects consistent with the theory. The proposed framework suggests a broader connection between wavelet localisation, local regularity organisation, and finite-support multiscale stochastic operators. Wavelet localisation becomes an operational mechanism for probing localised multiscale structure.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于局部小波变换的多重分形随机游走（MRW）解缠方法，通过局部调制冻结机制，将对数小波振幅近似分解为加性形式，从而将协方差形式的MRW解缠转化为局部多尺度算子问题。数值实验支持该理论框架的有效性。
AI.motivation: 现有MRW解缠方法依赖全局协方差结构，未能充分利用小波局域化特性对调制场的局部探测能力。本文旨在发展一种局部化的小波框架，使调制场在充分局域的探测域内近似"冻结"，从而实现对多分形随机结构的局部多尺度探测。
AI.method: 提出局部调制冻结近似：在有限支撑小波局域化条件下，乘性调制场可在局部探测域内近似视为冻结，使得对数小波振幅满足加性分解。将协方差MRW解缠重构为局部多尺度算子问题，分析支撑几何、尺度依赖重叠、内部调制变异性对近似有效性的影响。
AI.result: 理论推导表明，有限尺度偏差源于支持域几何与调制场的相互作用，产生结构化的协方差畸变。正交小波分解的数值实验验证了尺度依赖冻结机制、残差协方差混合及有限支撑破裂效应的存在。
AI.conclusion: 小波局域化本身成为探测局部随机组织结构的操作性机制，揭示了小波局域化、局部正则性组织与有限支撑多尺度随机算子之间的深层联系。

title: Impedance Matching and Absorption Enhancement in Helical Carbon Coil Microwave Absorbers via Tunable Anchoring Layer Thickness
summary: Helical carbon coils exhibit unique three dimensional chiral architectures that can effectively interact with microwaves in the 2 to 18 GHz range. Inspired by recent experimental studies, we develop a coarse grained electrodynamic model for helical carbon coil arrays supported on quartz substrates, and examine their potential as microwave absorbers. Guided by the heuristic relation $f_{\mathrm{res}} = c / (n_{\mathrm{eff}} p)$, we compute absorption and reflection fractions for both bare helical carbon coil on substrate and helical carbon coil with anchoring layer on substrate configurations. The anchoring layer thickness is treated as a tunable parameter to improve absorption at selected frequencies. We find that the introduction of a carbon based anchoring layer of optimized thickness enhances impedance matching absorption. The parameters are chosen as representative values for demonstration purposes, and may vary within a certain range depending on preparation conditions. Our results serve to illustrate the potential of helical carbon coils as microwave absorbing devices, and to identify possible active tuning strategies. In the discussion section, we consider extensions of the present model to account for circular dichroism absorption, and examine the influence of actual interfacial reflection on microwave absorption and reflection.

AI.tldr: 本文构建了螺旋碳线圈阵列的粗粒化电动力学模型，研究其在2-18 GHz频段作为微波吸收材料的潜力，发现引入优化厚度的碳基锚定层可增强阻抗匹配吸收。
AI.motivation: 螺旋碳线圈具有独特的三维手性结构，能在2-18 GHz范围内有效与微波相互作用。受近期实验研究启发，作者希望通过建模分析其作为微波吸收材料的潜力。
AI.method: 开发了螺旋碳线圈阵列的粗粒化电动力学模型，基于启发式关系式计算吸收和反射分数，并将锚定层厚度作为可调参数以优化特定频率的吸收性能。
AI.result: 引入碳基锚定层并优化其厚度可增强阻抗匹配吸收；参数选取具有示范性，实际制备中可在一定范围内变化。
AI.conclusion: 螺旋碳线圈具有作为微波吸收器件的潜力，并可实现主动调谐策略；讨论了模型扩展方向，包括圆二色性吸收和界面反射的影响。

title: Effect of the hyperbolic photon mode on the metal insulator transition in a proximate material
summary: The hyperbolic mode (HM) refers to a polariton mode where the dielectric function is negative in some direction of propagation. Within a frequency window the light occupies a greatly expanded region in momentum space. We compute the photon density of states and find that the zero point fluctuation in the RMS electric field can reach $MV/cm$, comparable to the largest field used in pump probe experiments in the THz scale. The HM in hexagonal Boron Nitride (hBN) has been under intense study and we consider placing a material that is near the Mott transition directly on top hBN. We find that a substantial shift in the metal-insulator transition is possible, but the effect decays rapidly with distance, so that only a few monolayers are affected. We provide estimates and suggestions for a number of materials of interest.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了双曲模式（HM）的物理特性，发现其零点涨落电场可达MV/cm量级。将这种模式应用于近Mott相变材料（如放置在hBN上）时，可显著改变金属-绝缘体相变，但效应随距离快速衰减，仅影响几个原子层。
AI.motivation: 探索双曲模式中巨大的真空电场涨落（MV/cm量级）是否能用于调控材料的量子相变，特别是金属-绝缘体相变。
AI.method: 计算双曲模式下的光子态密度和零点涨落电场；理论分析将近Mott相变材料置于hBN上时，双曲模式对相变点的影响随距离的变化关系。
AI.result: 双曲模式中零点涨落电场可达MV/cm，与太赫兹泵浦探测实验中最大场强相当；该电场可显著移动金属-绝缘体相变点，但效应随距离快速衰减，仅影响几个单层厚度。
AI.conclusion: 双曲模式为调控超薄材料的量子相变提供了新途径，但仅限于近表面区域；给出了若干候选材料的建议和估计。

title: Stitching Molecular Worlds Together with Physics-Coupled Diffusion Models
summary: Complex chemical systems often contain multiple components or large molecules, giving rise to substantial chemical and conformational complexity. Modeling the structures of these systems is crucial for mechanistic understanding of chemical processes and rational design, but remains highly challenging for both conventional theoretical approaches and machine learning. Here, we introduce physical-interaction-coupled diffusion models (PICDiff), a framework that couples independently trained diffusion models for subsystems of a complex system through explicit bonded and nonbonded interactions during inference. PICDiff reduces the difficulty of applying generative models to chemically and conformationally complex systems by decomposing them into smaller subsystems that are less complex and more amenable to machine-learning-based modeling. Using peptide-polymer binding and polymer conformation sampling as examples, we demonstrate that PICDiff can quantitatively sample conformations and model the thermodynamics of complex chemical systems. These results show that PICDiff provides a general and practical approach for modeling complex chemical systems by combining learned models of simpler molecular subsystems through physical interactions.

AI.tldr: 本文提出PICDiff框架，通过物理相互作用耦合多个独立训练的扩散模型，实现对复杂化学系统（如肽-聚合物结合、聚合物构象）的构象采样和热力学建模。
AI.motivation: 复杂化学系统（多组分或大分子）的结构建模对机理理解和理性设计至关重要，但传统理论方法和机器学习都面临巨大挑战。
AI.method: 将复杂系统分解为多个子系统，分别训练扩散模型，并在推理阶段通过显式的键合和非键合相互作用将这些模型耦合起来（PICDiff框架）。
AI.result: 在肽-聚合物结合和聚合物构象采样任务中，PICDiff能够定量采样构象并建模复杂化学系统的热力学。
AI.conclusion: PICDiff提供了一种通用且实用的方法，通过物理相互作用组合简单分子子系统的学习模型，来建模复杂化学系统。

title: Staggered Virtual-Loop-Current Order in Pseudospin-1 Dirac Flat Bands
summary: Although interactions are known to generate exotic phases in pseudospin-1/2 flat-band Dirac materials, it remains an open question whether the higher-pseudospin systems could realize entirely new types of orders and, if so, how such orders are governed by the nature of the underlying Dirac states. Here, we demonstrate that short-range interactions can drive a staggered virtual-loop-current (SVLC) order together with a $\sqrt{3}\times\sqrt{3}$ charge order in a partially filled pseudospin-1 Dirac flat band of the dice lattice. The virtual loop currents are shown to originate from interaction-driven quantum fluctuations of charge densities and exhibit alternating circulation between the neighboring triangular plaquettes. The resulting spontaneous time-reversal symmetry breaking is found to induce finite intrinsic anomalous Hall conductivity and orbital magnetization. The SVLC state is shown to be the lowest energy solution in restricted real-space Hartree-Fock calculations in the weakly interacting regime. The pseudospin-1 Dirac cones enter the SVLC order through the equivalence of their flat-band wavefunctions, and unlike the pseudospin-1/2 Dirac systems, do not rely on the presence of well-defined low-energy valleys in the electronic spectrum. Our study establishes higher-pseudospin Dirac systems as a new platform for investigating exotic emergent orders in flat-band physics.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了在骰子晶格部分填充的赝自旋-1狄拉克平带中，短程相互作用可以驱动交错虚环流（SVLC）序和√3×√3电荷序，导致自发时间反演对称性破缺，并产生有限的本征反常霍尔电导和轨道磁化。
AI.motivation: 探究更高赝自旋系统中能否实现全新类型的序，以及这些序如何受底层狄拉克态性质的控制，填补赝自旋-1/2平带狄拉克材料之外的理论空白。
