title: Carbon Layer Orientation and Closed-Pore Construction Achieving Ultra-Low Specific Surface Area Hard Carbon for High-Performance Na-ion Storage
summary: Addressing the critical trade-off between initial Coulombic efficiency (ICE) and reversible capacity in hard carbon anodes for Na-ion batteries (NIBs), we introduce a novel coupling strategy that combines carbon layer orientation reconstruction with closed-pore construction to produce hard carbon with an ultra-low specific surface area. We demonstrate that the nanographite domains within the hard carbon precursor undergo entropy-driven orientation reconstruction through the synergistic regulation of heteroatom doping and medium-temperature carbonization. This process not only increases interlayer spacing and promotes structural disorder but also enables the formation of dense, closed pores and ultramicropores at domain boundaries via confined atomic migration, while simultaneously encapsulating surface open pores within internal closed ones. Due to this unique pore architecture, our hard carbon exhibits an ultra-low specific surface area of 1.89 m2 g-1 with a markedly higher proportion of closed pores. As a result, our hard carbon achieves a remarkable reversible capacity of 342.3 mAh g-1 at 20 mA g-1, with an exceptional ICE of 90.4% and a dominant plateau capacity of 262.3 mAh g-1 (76.6%) for NIBs. We believe this coupling strategy provides a new paradigm for the structural engineering of high-ICE anode materials in advanced NIBs.

AI.tldr: 本文提出碳层取向重构与闭孔构建的耦合策略，制备出超低比表面积（1.89 m² g⁻¹）的硬碳负极材料，在钠离子电池中实现了342.3 mAh g⁻¹的可逆容量和90.4%的首次库仑效率（ICE），其中平台容量占比高达76.6%。
AI.motivation: 硬碳负极在钠离子电池中面临首次库仑效率（ICE）与可逆容量之间的关键权衡问题，亟需一种能够同时提升两者的结构设计策略。
AI.method: 通过杂原子掺杂与中温碳化的协同调控，驱动硬碳前驱体中纳米石墨域的熵驱动取向重构，不仅增大层间距、促进结构无序，还通过限域原子迁移在畴界形成致密闭孔和超微孔，同时将表面开孔封装于内部闭孔之中。
AI.result: 制得的硬碳比表面积低至1.89 m² g⁻¹，闭孔比例显著提高；在20 mA g⁻¹电流密度下，可逆容量达342.3 mAh g⁻¹，ICE高达90.4%，平台容量为262.3 mAh g⁻¹（占比76.6%）。
AI.conclusion: 该碳层取向重构与闭孔构建的耦合策略为先进钠离子电池中高ICE负极材料的结构工程提供了新范式。

title: Field-selected seven-site topological magnons in a classical frustrated triangular-lattice K-$Γ$-$Γ'$ magnet
summary: Defining magnon topology in strongly frustrated magnets is often hindered by the absence of a simple harmonic magnon vacuum at zero field. Within a classical-spin ground-state search followed by linear spin-wave theory (LSWT), we demonstrate that a representative triangular-lattice K-Gamma-Gamma' model in a dominant-Gamma exchange regime has an in-plane-field-selected compact, noncoplanar seven-site order. This field-selected state provides a controlled classical reference state and hosts magnon bands with field-tunable Chern numbers. Increasing the field drives a Dirac-like band touching that transfers Berry curvature between the fifth and sixth bands, altering the Chern vector from (0, 1, 0, -2, 1, 0, 0) to (0, 1, 0, -2, -1, 2, 0). This topological transition reorganizes the band-resolved thermal Hall conductivity, driving the total $κ_{xy}(T)$ through a near-zero crossing once the upper bands are thermally populated. The dynamical structure factor places roughly half of the coherent spectral weight on the Chern-active branches, offering a spectroscopic route to identify the topological branches. These results define a controlled semiclassical benchmark for magnon topology in this pure nearest-neighbor exchange model.

AI.tldr: 本文研究强阻挫磁体中磁子拓扑，发现三角晶格K-Γ-Γ'模型在优势Γ交换下，面内磁场可选出非共面七位有序态。该态支持场可调陈数的磁子能带，磁场驱动Dirac-like能带接触导致贝里曲率转移和陈矢量变化，进而调控热霍尔电导率。约一半相干谱权重位于陈活性支路上，为光谱识别拓扑支路提供途径。
AI.motivation: 强阻挫磁体中，由于缺乏简单的简谐磁子真空，定义磁子拓扑面临困难。本文旨在通过经典自旋基态搜索和线性自旋波理论，为纯最近邻交换模型中的磁子拓扑提供一个可控的半经典基准。
AI.method: 采用经典自旋基态搜索结合线性自旋波理论（LSWT），研究三角晶格K-Γ-Γ'模型在优势Γ交换区域的行为。通过施加面内磁场选择紧凑的非共面七位有序态作为经典参考态，计算磁子能带及其陈数，并分析热霍尔电导率和动态结构因子。
AI.result: 磁场选择出非共面七位有序态，磁子能带具有场可调陈数。磁场增加导致Dirac-like能带接触，贝里曲率从第五条带转移到第六条带，陈矢量从(0,1,0,-2,1,0,0)变为(0,1,0,-2,-1,2,0)。该拓扑转变调控了热霍尔电导率，使总κ_{xy}(T)在高能带热占据后出现近零交叉。约一半相干谱权重位于陈活性支路上。
AI.conclusion: 本研究为纯最近邻交换模型中强阻挫磁体的磁子拓扑提供了可控的半经典基准，揭示了磁场调控拓扑相变的机制，并为实验上通过光谱手段识别拓扑磁子分支提供了可行方案。

title: Hidden chirality and half-vortex formation in exciton-polariton condensates
summary: We show that a radially symmetric, nonresonantly pumped spinor exciton-polariton condensate can acquire chirality without a rotating drive, chiral geometry, or pump orbital angular momentum. Spin relaxation in a two-reservoir system shifts the reservoir-induced blueshift relative to the gain profile, creating an effective non-Hermitian chiral potential. A reduced angular-mode theory reveals tunable exceptional points and non-reciprocal coupling between counter-rotating modes. Full driven-dissipative Gross-Pitaevskii simulations show that this hidden chirality enables all-optical formation of spin-selective half-vortices.

AI.tldr: 本文发现非共振泵浦的径向对称自旋激子极化激元凝聚体，无需旋转驱动、手性几何或泵浦轨道角动量即可自发产生手性。其机制源于双储层系统中的自旋弛豫，通过调节储层诱导蓝移与增益分布，形成非厄米手性势。基于约化角模理论揭示了可调谐奇异点及逆旋模间的非互易耦合。全驱动-耗散Gross-Pitaevskii模拟表明，这种隐藏手性可实现自旋选择性半涡旋的全光学形成。
AI.motivation: 探索在无旋转驱动、无手性几何结构、无泵浦轨道角动量条件下，自旋激子极化激元凝聚体能否自发获得手性，并揭示其物理机制。
AI.method: 通过理论分析双储层系统中自旋弛豫导致的能级偏移效应，构建约化角模理论描述奇异点与非互易耦合，并利用全驱动-耗散Gross-Pitaevskii方程进行数值模拟验证。
AI.result: 成功实现了无需任何外部手性因素的自发手性产生，并观察到可调谐奇异点及逆旋模间的非互易耦合，最终通过模拟展示了自旋选择性半涡旋的全光学形成。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了隐藏手性这一新现象，为在全光学系统中操控拓扑自旋结构（如半涡旋）提供了新途径，对发展自旋光子学器件具有重要意义。

title: Extracting Boundary Conformal Data from Periodic Non-Hermitian Critical Chains
summary: Boundary conformal field theory (BCFT) contains universal data that are usually accessed microscopically by imposing spatial boundaries on the lattice. Here, we introduce a periodic-chain projected-partition-function spectroscopy that extracts universal boundary quantities directly from non-Hermitian bulk-critical quantum chains, avoiding the need to engineer microscopic open boundaries and circumventing subtle boundary effects in non-Hermitian systems. Using a short-range-entangled boundary preparation and its infrared-compatible left dual, we obtain the Affleck-Ludwig boundary entropy in non-Hermitian systems. We demonstrate this construction for two representative non-Hermitian infrared structures. For a $\mathcal{PT}$-symmetric Ising realization of the real nonunitary Yang-Lee CFT, we extract the minimal-boundary projected coefficient and recover a nontrivial negative excited-to-ground ratio. For the genuinely complex fixed points of the non-Hermitian five-state Potts chain, we resolve intrinsically complex boundary coefficients and reproduce the exact relation required by the Kramers-Wannier duality. Our results establish a route to nonunitary BCFT universal data via only knowledge of the bulk critical system, opening a window into non-Hermitian boundary criticality.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种周期链投影配分函数谱方法，通过非厄米体临界量子链直接提取边界共形场论（BCFT）中的普适边界数据，避免了在格点上构造开放边界和处理非厄米系统中边界效应的困难。作者在PT对称Ising实现和非厄米五态Potts链中成功提取了Affleck-Ludwig边界熵和复杂边界系数，验证了方法的有效性。
AI.motivation: 传统BCFT研究需要在格点上施加空间边界来获取边界普适数据，但在非厄米系统中，工程化微观开放边界会引入微妙的边界效应，给提取普适数据带来困难。作者希望绕过这一限制，直接利用体临界系统的信息来获取边界普适数据。
AI.method: 提出周期链投影配分函数谱方法（periodic-chain projected-partition-function spectroscopy），利用短程纠缠边界制备及其红外兼容的左对偶，从非厄米体临界量子链中提取Affleck-Ludwig边界熵等BCFT普适量。
AI.result: 在PT对称Ising实现（实非幺正Yang-Lee CFT）中，提取了最小边界投影系数，恢复了非平凡的负激发-基态比值；在非厄米五态Potts链（复不动点）中，解析了本征复边界系数，并再现了Kramers-Wannier对偶所需的精确关系。
AI.conclusion: 建立了一条仅通过体临界系统知识获取非幺正BCFT普适数据的新路径，为非厄米边界临界性研究打开了窗口。

title: Van der waals engineering of valley polarization in WSe2 via kagome V2O3 monolayer heterostructure through magnetic proximity effect
summary: To achieve a robust valley splitting in transition metal dichalcogenides (TMDs) at zero magnetic field is a challenging and elusive goal for valleytronic and spintronic devices. Therefore, in the current study, using the first principles calculations, we introduce an oxide-driven valleytronic platform by employing a two-dimensional ferromagnetic oxide (V2O3) as a magnetic proximity partner for WSe2. We found that the intrinsic ferromagnetism of V2O3 induces a prominent and spontaneous valley splitting of ~ 10.41 meV in WSe2. This pronounced valley polarization mainly originates from the strong interfacial exchange coupling interaction and charge redistribution mediated by V 3d electrons, coupled with the intrinsic spin-orbit coupling of WSe2. Interestingly, this value is significantly greater than the previously reported value for CrI3/WSe2, which corresponds to an effective magnetic field of ~ 10 T. Besides, we also have a high Curie temperature of 500 K, and an out-of-plane magnetic anisotropy energy (MAE) of 0.31 meV, indicating that this oxide-based heterostructure can also be used for near-room temperature operation. Importantly, under the external electric field with a step of 0.1 eV/Å, the ferromagnetism is preserved and an enhancement in Curie temperature and MAE makes this oxide-based heterostructure more valuable for the next generation valleytronic devices. Therefore, these findings establish a new paradigm for realizing tunable, robust, and magnetic field-free valleytronic and spintronic devices for this oxide-based heterostructure. Moreover, this concept can be generalized to other correlated oxide-based TMD systems, providing a versatile strategy for next-generation quantum and functional materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过第一性原理计算，提出利用二维铁磁氧化物V2O3与WSe2构建异质结构，实现了~10.41 meV的自发谷劈裂，远优于CrI3/WSe2体系，且具有高居里温度(500 K)和垂直磁各向异性，为无磁场谷电子学器件提供了新平台。
AI.motivation: 在过渡金属硫族化合物(TMDs)中实现零磁场下的稳健谷劈裂是一项极具挑战的目标，现有方法难以满足谷电子学和自旋电子学器件的实际需求。
AI.method: 采用第一性原理计算，将二维铁磁氧化物V2O3作为磁邻近耦合伙伴与WSe2构建异质结构，通过界面交换耦合和电荷再分配机制实现谷极化。
AI.result: WSe2中实现了~10.41 meV的自发谷劈裂（对应~10 T有效磁场），高于已报道的CrI3/WSe2体系；居里温度达500 K，垂直磁各向异性能为0.31 meV；在外电场下铁磁性保持，居里温度和MAE进一步提升。
AI.conclusion: 该氧化物基异质结构为可调谐、稳健、无需磁场的下一代谷电子学和自旋电子学器件提供了新范式，并可推广至其他关联氧化物-TMD体系。

title: Spin-orbit-entangled $J_{\rm eff}=\frac{1}{2}$ magnetism and unconventional spin freezing in the bond-disordered pyrochlore antiferromagnet NaCdCo$_2$F$_7$
summary: Bond disorder in frustrated pyrochlore antiferromagnets can give rise to fundamentally different quantum ground states depending on the nature of the local magnetic moments. Here, we show that the bond-disordered pyrochlore NaCdCo$_2$F$_7$ realizes an unconventional spin-glass-like state with continued dynamics, in stark contrast to its isostructural $S=\frac{1}{2}$ NaCdCu$_2$F$_7$ counterpart. High-field magnetization and Co $L_{2,3}$-edge XAS/XMCD establish spin-orbit-entangled $J_{\rm eff}=\frac{1}{2}$ Co$^{2+}$ moments with a substantial unquenched orbital contribution, consistent with local $XY$ anisotropy seen in the isostructural Na$A''$Co$_2$F$_7$ ($A''$ = Ca, Sr) analogues. $μ$SR and $^{23}$Na NMR measurements reveal progressive slowing of spin fluctuations below $\sim10$ K, culminating in a partially frozen state with persistent low-temperature dynamics that deviates from a canonical spin glass. Comparison with the isostructural bond-disordered pyrochlore NaCdCu$_2$F$_7$, which realizes a random-singlet state, reveals a fundamentally different response of spin-orbit-entangled Co$^{2+}$ moments to bond disorder. These results identify spin-orbit coupling as a key ingredient governing the fate of bond-disordered frustrated pyrochlore magnets.

AI.tldr: 本文研究键无序焦绿石反铁磁体NaCdCo₂F₇，发现自旋轨道纠缠的Co²⁺矩（Jeff=1/2）在键无序下形成具有持续动力学的非常规自旋玻璃态，与同构的NaCdCu₂F₇（S=1/2）中的随机单重态完全不同，表明自旋轨道耦合是决定键无序阻挫焦绿石磁体基态的关键因素。
AI.motivation: 探究键无序焦绿石反铁磁体中，局域磁矩性质（自旋轨道纠缠 vs. 纯自旋）如何影响量子基态。
AI.method: 结合高场磁化测量、Co L₂,₃边XAS/XMCD、μSR和²³Na NMR等多种实验手段，对NaCdCo₂F₇进行表征，并与同构的NaCdCu₂F₇进行对比。
AI.result: NaCdCo₂F₇中Co²⁺为自旋轨道纠缠的Jeff=1/2矩，具有未淬灭的轨道贡献和局域XY各向异性；低温下自旋涨落逐渐减慢，形成部分冻结态并伴有持续动力学，偏离标准自旋玻璃行为；与NaCdCu₂F₇的随机单重态形成鲜明对比。
AI.conclusion: 自旋轨道耦合是决定键无序阻挫焦绿石磁体基态的关键因素。

title: Direct Nanoscale Pyroelectric Characterization of a CuInP${}_2$S${}_6$ van der Waals Nanogenerator
summary: Pyroelectric energy conversion offers a route for harvesting time-dependent thermalfluctuations that are abundant in natural and technological environments. Twodimensional ferroelectrics are particularly attractive for this purpose because reduced dimensionality enables ultrathin, mechanically compliant device architectures. Here, we demonstrate direct nanoscale pyroelectric characterization of an out-of-plane van der Waals nanogenerator based on CuInP2S6 (CIPS) encapsulated between few-layer graphene electrodes. A scanning thermal microscopy (SThM) probe is employed as a localized nanoscale heat source while the electrically generated response is measured in situ through the device electrodes. Harmonic detection isolates the pyroelectric signal from parasitic first-harmonic electromechanical contributions, while finite-element thermal modeling combined with probe calibration enables direct determination of the local pyroelectric coefficient from the measured electrical response. Beyond quantitative characterization, the spatially resolved measurements directly identify electrically inactive regions associated with device defects, revealing local performance-limiting features that remain hidden in conventional spatially averaged pyroelectric measurements. The presented approach establishes a versatile platform for quantitative nanoscale pyroelectric characterization and the optimization of van der Waals pyroelectric devices.

AI.tldr: 本文展示了一种基于CuInP2S6 (CIPS)的纳米级范德华热释电能量收集器件，利用扫描热显微镜探针作为局部热源，结合谐波检测和有限元热建模，实现了对热释电系数的定量测量和空间分辨表征，并能识别传统方法无法发现的器件缺陷。
AI.motivation: 热释电能量转换可捕获自然界和工业环境中的时变热波动，而二维铁电材料因其超薄、机械柔顺的特性极具应用潜力，但缺乏有效的纳米级表征手段。
AI.method: 使用扫描热显微镜探针作为局部纳米热源，原位测量电响应；采用谐波检测分离热释电信号与寄生机电贡献；结合有限元热建模和探针校准，从电响应中直接确定局部热释电系数。
AI.result: 成功实现了对CIPS器件的纳米级热释电表征，定量测量了局部热释电系数，并通过空间分辨测量直接识别了与器件缺陷相关的电学非活性区域。
AI.conclusion: 该方法建立了一个用于定量纳米级热释电表征和优化范德华热释电器件的多功能平台，能够发现传统空间平均测量无法揭示的局部性能限制因素。

title: Riviera model with egoistical settlers
summary: The Riviera model mimics a densifying settlement along the coastline. In the lattice version, houses are built sequentially in empty sites with the constraint that every newly built house has at least one empty neighboring site. The distribution of clusters of adjacent houses does not obey a closed set of evolutionary equations, but the void-cluster-void distribution does. We compute the latter and extract the cluster distribution from it. In the jammed state, when all voids have length one and the evolution ceases, the cluster distribution has a neat form and exhibits a factorial decay with the length of the cluster. To investigate finite systems, we employ a static approach directly treating jammed states. If the coastline is a finite segment, we determine the statistics of the number of empty sites in the jammed state (the average, variance, and higher cumulants). We also study a continuum version in which houses are built along the line so that each newly built house is sufficiently separated from at least one neighboring house.

AI.tldr: 该论文研究了一种沿海岸线逐渐密集定居的Riviera模型，通过分析空隙团簇分布和堵塞态下的团簇统计特征，揭示了有限系统和连续版本中房屋分布的数学规律。
AI.motivation: 理解在沿岸线序贯建房约束下，团簇和空隙分布的非平凡统计特性，特别是堵塞态下的精确解析结果。
AI.method: 采用格子模型和连续模型两种版本。在格子模型中，通过空隙-团簇-空隙分布代替团簇分布建立封闭演化方程；在有限系统中，采用静态方法直接处理堵塞态，并研究空隙数的统计量（均值、方差、高阶累积量）。
AI.result: 堵塞态下团簇分布具有简洁形式，呈现阶乘衰减；计算得到了空隙-团簇-空隙分布并从中提取了团簇分布；给出了有限线段上堵塞态空隙数的统计特性。
AI.conclusion: 该模型在堵塞态下具有精确可解的统计结构，团簇长度的阶乘衰减行为是其主要特征，且结果在格子模型和连续模型中都成立。

title: Intrinsic linewidths of confined phonons in few-layer hBN
summary: Understanding lattice vibrations in two-dimensional (2D) materials is essential for controlling thermal transport, mechanical response, and energy dissipation in nanoscale devices. However, the intrinsic lifetimes of low-energy phonon modes, particularly those that are optically silent, remain largely unexplored. Here we use helium-3 spin-echo spectroscopy to resolve low-energy phonons at the surface of hexagonal boron nitride (hBN) and measure their intrinsic linewidths. We observe the flexural and Rayleigh wave modes and extract the bending rigidity of a quasi-freestanding hBN monolayer. We further report the simultaneous observation of multiple surface-confined interlayer shear modes whose energies agree closely with linear-chain model predictions. By resolving their intrinsic linewidths, we demonstrate a strong confinement-induced reduction in phonon lifetimes, with a near order of magnitude increase in linewidth between the four- and two-layer modes. The temperature dependence of the linewidths indicates that phonon-phonon scattering dominates between 160-360K, while the systematic broadening with decreasing layer number reveals the impact of confinement on phonon decay. These results reveal how reduced dimensionality affects the decay of interlayer shearing modes in hBN, providing direct insight into the phonon lifetimes, confinement effects, and dissipation pathways that govern the dynamical behaviour of two-dimensional materials.

AI.tldr: 本文利用氦-3自旋回波谱学测量了六方氮化硼（hBN）表面的低能声子本征线宽，发现了层间剪切模在少层体系中因维度约束导致寿命显著缩短（四层到双层线宽增加近一个数量级），揭示了维度约束对声子衰变和耗散路径的影响。
AI.motivation: 二维材料中低能声子（特别是光学沉默模式）的本征寿命尚不清楚，缺乏实验手段直接测量其线宽，限制了热输运、机械响应和能量耗散机制的理解。
AI.method: 采用氦-3自旋回波谱学技术，测量hBN表面的低能声子模式及其本征线宽，同时结合线性链模型预测进行比对分析。
AI.result: 观察到了弯曲波和瑞利波模式，提取了准自由hBN单层的弯曲刚度；同时观测到多个表面束缚的层间剪切模，其能量与线性链模型高度吻合；发现层间剪切模的本征线宽随层数减少而显著增大（四层到双层增加近一个数量级），表明约束诱导的声子寿命缩短。
AI.conclusion: 维度约束强烈影响层间剪切模的声子衰变：在160-360K范围内声子-声子散射主导线宽，而随层数减少的系统展宽揭示了约束对声子耗散路径的作用，为理解二维材料的动力学行为提供了直接证据。

title: Electronic Green's function across the pseudogap to stripe transition in the $t$-$t'$-$J$ model
summary: Superconducting domes in strongly correlated electronic systems are often accompanied by charge density waves and peculiar features in the electronic structure. The appearance of a pseudogap, in particular, and its relation to charge density waves remains insufficiently understood. Here, we investigate the electronic Green's function of the underdoped $t$-$t'$-$J$ model of the cuprate superconductors using tensor network algorithms for finite temperature dynamics on cylinders of width $4$. We find the prominent momentum differentiation, the hallmark of the pseudogap, to be strongly dependent on $t'$, which develops into a momentum-dependent opening of a gap upon decreasing temperature, consistent with the formation of a Fermi arc at intermediate temperatures. The nodal gap around ${\bf k}=(π/2,π/2)$ closes and fills with increasing temperature as coherent stripe order melts into a regime of fluctuating charge clusters.

AI.tldr: 本文利用张量网络算法研究欠掺杂t-t'-J模型中的电子格林函数，发现赝能隙的动量分化强烈依赖于t'参数，随着温度降低会出现动量依赖的能隙开启，并在中间温度形成费米弧，节线能隙随温度升高而关闭，这是由条纹有序熔化进入电荷簇涨落区所导致。
AI.motivation: 探究强关联电子体系中赝能隙的出现机制及其与电荷密度波的关系，这是当前尚未被充分理解的关键问题。
AI.method: 使用张量网络算法计算宽度为4的圆柱上欠掺杂t-t'-J模型的有限温度动力学电子格林函数。
AI.result: 发现赝能隙特征（动量分化）强烈依赖t'参数，低温下出现动量依赖的能隙开启，中间温度形成费米弧；节线能隙随温度升高而关闭，伴随着从相干条纹有序向电荷簇涨落区的转变。
AI.conclusion: 赝能隙的形成与条纹有序的熔化过程密切相关，揭示了电荷密度波涨落与赝能隙之间的内在联系。

title: Real-space spectral functions of three-dimensional billion-size topological non-Hermitian matter with tensor networks
summary: Non-Hermitian systems host a wide range of unconventional topological phenomena while large-scale simulations in finite three dimensional systems remain challenging because of the rapidly growing number of sites. In particular, higher-order topological corner modes are often studied only in small lattices, where strong finite-size effects can mask their intrinsic behavior. Here, we develop a tensor-network framework that combines quantics tensor cross interpolation with the kernel polynomial method, enabling compact representations of large non-Hermitian tight-binding Hamiltonians and direct calculations of real-space spectral functions for systems exceeding one billion lattice sites. Using this approach, we investigate three-dimensional non-Hermitian higher-order topological insulators with with structured real-space geometries. The unprecedented system size enables direct access to the macroscopic regime and allows corner-mode spectral responses to be resolved in genuinely three-dimensional systems.By tuning the loss strength, we identify distinct in-gap corner modes across weak- and strong-loss regimes.Our results establish tensor-network algorithms as a powerful strategy to perform real-space spectral calculations in exceptionally large non-Hermitian systems.

AI.tldr: 本文开发了一种结合量子张量交叉插值和核多项式方法的张量网络框架，能够对超过十亿格点的非厄米紧束缚哈密顿量进行紧凑表示，并直接计算实空间谱函数。该方法成功研究了三维非厄米高阶拓扑绝缘体中的角态模，在大尺度下区分了弱损耗和强损耗区域的间隙内角态模，展示了张量网络在超大非厄米系统实空间谱计算中的强大能力。
AI.motivation: 非厄米系统蕴含丰富的反常拓扑现象，但三维有限系统的数值模拟面临格点数快速增长导致的巨大计算挑战。特别地，高阶拓扑角态模通常仅在小晶格中研究，强烈的有限尺寸效应掩盖了其内在行为。
AI.method: 提出了结合量子张量交叉插值（quantics tensor cross interpolation）与核多项式方法（kernel polynomial method）的张量网络框架，实现了对大型非厄米紧束缚哈密顿量的紧凑表示，并能直接计算超过十亿格点系统的实空间谱函数。
AI.result: 利用该方法研究了三维非厄米高阶拓扑绝缘体，在空前的大尺度下直接观察到了宏观区域的角态模谱响应；通过调节损耗强度，在弱损耗和强损耗区域分别识别出了不同的间隙内角态模。
AI.conclusion: 张量网络算法是解决超大非厄米系统实空间谱计算问题的有效策略，为探索非厄米拓扑现象提供了有力工具。

title: Exact solution of the Glauber-Ising model on the finite-length semi-open chain
summary: The exact time-space correlation function of the $1D$ Glauber-Ising model, quenched to temperature $T=0$ and on a semi-open lattice of finite size $N$, is obtained. This also allows to deduce the exact empty-interval probability of the dual $1D$ coagulation-diffusion process on a periodic finite ring and to reproduce the long-time decay of the particle concentration. These results are consistent with the generic expectations of dynamical finite-size scaling theory.

AI.tldr: 本文精确求解了淬火至零温的半开有限尺寸N的1D Glauber-Ising模型的时间-空间关联函数，并由此推导出对偶的1D凝聚-扩散过程在周期有限环上的精确空区间概率，再现了粒子浓度的长时间衰减行为，结果与动力学有限尺寸标度理论一致。
AI.motivation: 在统计物理领域，精确求解非平衡动力学模型（尤其是有限尺寸系统）的关联函数具有重要理论意义。作者旨在严格推导淬火至零温的有限尺寸Glauber-Ising模型的时空关联函数，以验证和丰富动力学有限尺寸标度理论。
AI.method: 作者采用解析方法，精确求解了1D Glauber-Ising模型在零温、半开有限晶格上的时间-空间关联函数。通过对偶性，进一步推导出1D凝聚-扩散过程在周期有限环上的空区间概率，并分析了粒子浓度的长时间衰减行为。
AI.result: 获得了有限尺寸半开Glauber-Ising模型在零温淬火下的精确时空关联函数；推导出对偶凝聚-扩散过程的精确空区间概率；再现了粒子浓度的长时间衰减规律。这些结果与动力学有限尺寸标度理论的预期一致。
AI.conclusion: 本文通过精确求解有限尺寸系统的关联函数，验证了动力学有限尺寸标度理论在零温淬火条件下的适用性，为非平衡统计物理中的有限尺寸效应研究提供了严格的理论参考。

title: Surface-Sensitive Mapping of Anisotropic Phonon Cascades in T$_{d}$-WTe$_{2}$
summary: Understanding how energy flows from photoexcited carriers into the lattice is essential for describing nonequilibrium phenomena in low-symmetry quantum materials. Here, we use ultrafast low-energy electron diffraction and diffuse scattering to probe momentum-resolved phonon dynamics at the surface of T$_{d}$-WTe$_{2}$, a strongly anisotropic semimetal. Following optical excitation, the Debye-Waller suppression of Bragg peaks reveals a biexponential increase of the mean-squared atomic displacement, indicating sequential lattice relaxation. Analysis of the diffuse background reveals a preferential intensity build-up parallel to the tungsten-chain axis in the material, attributed to anisotropic electron-phonon coupling during electronic cooling. Diffuse intensity subsequently redistributes across the surface Brillouin zone and finally accumulates near the zone centre, consistent with anharmonic phonon-phonon scattering and the gradual population of low-frequency acoustic modes on a 30--100 ps timescale. The results reveal a hierarchical relaxation pathway in which energy is first deposited into selected finite-momentum phonons before spreading through the broader lattice bath. Our work highlights the importance of momentum-resolved diffuse scattering for disentangling electron-phonon and phonon-phonon relaxation in anisotropic topological semimetals.

AI.tldr: 利用超快低能电子衍射和漫散射技术，研究了各向异性半金属Td-WTe2表面光激发后的声子动力学，揭示了能量从光生载流子到晶格的分层级弛豫路径：首先通过各向异性电子-声子耦合选择性激发有限动量声子，随后通过非谐声子-声子散射逐步扩散至整个晶格热浴。
AI.motivation: 理解低对称性量子材料中光生载流子能量如何流入晶格，对于描述非平衡现象至关重要，但目前缺乏动量分辨的声子动力学信息。
AI.method: 采用超快低能电子衍射和漫散射技术，动量分辨地探测Td-WTe2表面的声子动力学，分析布拉格峰的德拜-瓦勒衰减和漫散射背景的各向异性演化。
AI.result: 布拉格峰衰减显示双指数行为，反映平均原子位移的逐步弛豫；漫散射强度优先沿钨链方向积累，归因于各向异性电子-声子耦合；随后强度在布里渊区重新分布并聚集于区中心，对应30-100 ps时间尺度上的非谐声子-声子散射。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了分层级弛豫路径：能量先沉积于特定有限动量声子，再扩散至整个晶格热浴；强调了动量分辨漫散射在解耦各向异性拓扑半金属中电子-声子和声子-声子弛豫过程的重要性。

title: Activated Migration of Localized Ligand-Field Excitons in Atomically Thin CrCl3
summary: Two-dimensional crystals with densely packed atoms exhibit a range of emerging properties, particularly a wide variety of excitonic behaviors. Thickness-variable layered chromium trihalides with finite surface recombination sites provide an ideal system for understanding how excitons confined in octahedral ligand fields migrate on nanometer length scales, a regime that defies conventional transport probes. In this work, we demonstrate that Cr3+-derived photoluminescence in CrCl3 is spectrally thickness-independent, but its relaxation dynamics are strongly sensitive to thickness and temperature, thereby indicating significant activated migration. A diffusion-coupled surface recombination model reveals an effective out-of-plane diffusivity of 4.5 x 10-6 cm2/s for the ligand-field excitons and a diffusion activation energy of 130 meV. The latter is comparable to the reorganization energy independently estimated from optical Stokes shifts, suggesting that exciton transport is coupled to local lattice relaxation. Furthermore, we show that the relaxation dynamics can be systematically tuned by either enhancing or suppressing surface recombination through controlled surface reactions or encapsulation. This work not only reveals the nanoscopic transport of localized ligand-field excitons but also establishes a spectroscopic transport probe applicable to various 2D materials.

AI.tldr: 本文研究CrCl₃中配位场激子的纳米尺度迁移行为，发现其光致发光光谱与厚度无关，但弛豫动力学受厚度和温度影响。通过扩散耦合表面复合模型，测得有效面外扩散系数为4.5×10⁻⁶ cm²/s，扩散激活能为130 meV。该激活能与光学斯托克斯位移估算的重组能相当，表明激子输运与局域晶格弛豫耦合。通过表面反应或封装可调控弛豫动力学。
AI.motivation: 理解二维铬三卤化物中配位场激子（被困在八面体配位场中的局域激子）在纳米尺度上的迁移机制，这是一个传统输运探测手段难以触及的尺度范围。
AI.method: 利用CrCl₃中Cr³⁺衍生的光致发光光谱和弛豫动力学测量，结合扩散耦合表面复合模型进行定量分析，并通过表面反应和封装实验验证调控能力。
AI.result: 发现有效面外扩散系数为4.5×10⁻⁶ cm²/s，扩散激活能为130 meV，且该激活能与独立估算的重组能一致，表明激子输运与局域晶格弛豫耦合。
AI.conclusion: 该工作不仅揭示了局域配位场激子的纳米尺度输运机制，还建立了一种可用于多种二维材料的光谱学输运探测方法。

title: Disentangling multi-spin dynamic correlations in the Heisenberg spin-$\frac{1}{2}$ chain
summary: Higher-order correlations are essential for understanding exotic phases and uncovering universal aspects of quantum dynamics. While inelastic neutron scattering provides well-established access to two-particle correlations, measuring correlations in solids involving more than two particles remains a major challenge. Focusing on magnetic excitations in the Heisenberg spin-$\frac{1}{2}$ chain, we demonstrate that resonant inelastic X-ray scattering (RIXS) can selectively probe multi-spin dynamical correlations by exciting distinct intermediate states through energy detuning. Through theoretical modeling, we isolate the two- and multi- spin responses, and establish that: (i) The resonant energies of the two- and multi- spin dynamical correlations are separated by $\approx \frac{3}{4}J$; implying that the multi-spin part of the cross-section comes from intermediate states that contain spin flips; (ii) The spectral weight of the two-spin channel exhibits a Lorentzian resonant energy profile consistent with a single dominant electronic configuration, whereas the multi-spin channel response shows a Gaussian-like profile, implying contributions from multiple intermediate spin configurations. These characteristics are reproduced by exact diagonalization of the $t-J$ Hamiltonian, which further reveals that the widths of Lorentzian and Gaussian resonant energy profiles depend primarily on core-hole lifetime ($Γ/2$) and $\frac{2J}Γ$, respectively. Controlled access to multi-spin dynamics, using RIXS energy detuning as a knob, can open new pathways to explore many-body dynamics in quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 本文通过理论建模和精确对角化，证明共振非弹性X射线散射（RIXS）可以通过能量失谐选择性地探测海森堡自旋-1/2链中的多自旋动力学关联，并揭示了双自旋与多自旋通道在共振能量谱上的特征差异（洛伦兹型 vs 高斯型），为研究量子材料中的多体动力学提供了新途径。
AI.motivation: 高阶关联对于理解奇异相和揭示量子动力学的普适方面至关重要，但现有非弹性中子散射仅能测量两粒子关联，涉及超过两个粒子的关联测量仍是一大挑战。作者旨在证明RIXS能够选择性地探测多自旋动力学关联。
AI.method: 聚焦海森堡自旋-1/2链中的磁激发，利用RIXS通过能量失谐激发不同的中间态来选择性探测多自旋动力学关联；结合理论建模分离双自旋与多自旋响应；通过t-J哈密顿量的精确对角化验证结果。
AI.result: (i) 双自旋与多自旋动力学关联的共振能量相差约3J/4，多自旋部分来自包含自旋翻转的中间态；(ii) 双自旋通道的谱权重呈现洛伦兹型共振能量廓线，而多自旋通道呈现高斯型廓线；谱线宽度分别取决于核心空穴寿命Γ/2和2J/Γ。
AI.conclusion: 通过RIXS能量失谐作为调控手段，可以实现对多自旋动力学的可控访问，为探索量子材料中的多体动力学开辟了新途径。

title: Distributed Acoustic Sensing for Urban Monitoring: Coverage Thresholds and Percolation
summary: Distributed Acoustic Sensing (DAS) enables the repurposing of existing fiber-optic networks as ultra-dense, long-range seismic arrays for urban monitoring. However, constraints imposed by real-world fiber infrastructure topology and components limit its use for city-scale applications. Recent technological developments have paved the way for short-range, on-chip DAS. Assuming their availability, and based on a Graph Theory framework, we show that monitoring applications fall along a coverage spectrum with two critical thresholds that define three distinct regimes. Low coverage (<10%) can, with optimal design, resolve earthquake early warning, groundwater monitoring, geological mapping, and urban activity tracking. A percolation transition occurs at 51.6% coverage, beyond which the city effectively becomes fully covered and statistical traffic monitoring is possible. Only for effectively complete coverage, infrastructure monitoring, individual vehicle tracking, and pedestrian movement analysis become possible. Thus, privacy-related risks remain very low. We show and exemplify how, for metropolises around the world, an optimal sensing network can be designed for earthquake early warning, traffic monitoring, and urban activity tracking. This framework provides a near-future roadmap for deploying urban DAS networks as a backbone of smart city sensing.

AI.tldr: 本文基于图论框架分析分布式声学传感（DAS）在城市监测中的应用，发现存在两个关键覆盖阈值（10%和51.6%），定义了三个不同监测阶段：低覆盖可实现地震预警等，超过51.6%可实现统计交通监测，全覆盖才可实现基础设施监控和个体追踪，隐私风险极低。
AI.motivation: 现有DAS受限于光纤基础设施拓扑和组件，难以用于城市级应用。近期片上DAS技术发展为短程传感提供了可能，但如何规划传感器网络覆盖以平衡监测能力与隐私风险尚不明确。
AI.method: 基于图论框架，建立城市DAS覆盖率的理论模型，定义两个关键阈值（10%和51.6%）以划分三个监测阶段，并结合全球多个大都市案例进行最优传感网络设计验证。
AI.result: 低覆盖率（<10%）可支撑地震预警、地下水监测、地质测绘和城市活动追踪；51.6%覆盖率为渗流阈值，超过后城市近似全覆盖，可实现统计交通监测；仅当全覆盖时才能进行基础设施监测、个体车辆追踪和行人分析。隐私风险始终很低。
AI.conclusion: 该框架为未来城市DAS网络部署提供了路线图，可将其作为智慧城市感知的骨干基础设施，实现地震预警、交通监测和城市活动追踪等多功能协同。

title: Confined Oxygen-Vacancy Migration Drives Ferroelectric Switching
summary: Conventional ferroelectricity arises from intrinsic lattice distortions, whereas oxygen vacancies are generally regarded as detrimental because their migration induces leakage currents and polarization degradation. However, the recently discovered ultrathin van der Waals ferroelectric Bi2SeO5 exhibits robust out-of-plane polarization switching despite its pristine crystal symmetry forbidding the corresponding displacive ferroelectric instability. Here we show that this apparent contradiction originates from confined oxygen-vacancy migration. We find that oxygen vacancies preferentially form within SeO3 units and undergo reversible low-barrier rearrangements between nearly degenerate configurations. These localized vacancy dynamics generate a large switchable out-of-plane polarization, while long-range vacancy diffusion is suppressed by substantially higher migration barriers. At a representative vacancy concentration of 2.5%, the resulting polarization reaches approximately 16 uC cm^-2, consistent with experiment. Our results identify confined oxygen-vacancy migration as the microscopic origin of ferroelectric switching in Bi2SeO5 and establish defect-enabled ferroelectricity as a general mechanism for layered van der Waals oxides.

AI.tldr: 本文发现Bi2SeO5超薄铁电体的极化翻转源于受限氧空位迁移，而非传统晶格畸变，提出了缺陷驱动铁电性的新机制。
AI.motivation: 传统观点认为氧空位有害，但Bi2SeO5的极化翻转与完美晶体对称性矛盾，亟需解释其反常铁电性的微观起源。
AI.method: 通过第一性原理计算，分析氧空位在SeO3单元中的形成偏好、可逆低势垒重排路径，以及长程扩散的迁移能垒。
AI.result: 2.5%氧空位浓度下产生约16 μC/cm²的可翻转极化，与实验吻合；短程空位重排实现翻转，长程扩散被高势垒抑制。
AI.conclusion: 首次证实受限氧空位迁移是Bi2SeO5铁电翻转的微观机制，并将缺陷驱动铁电性推广为层状范德华氧化物的通用原理。

title: Compact Spin-Charge Separated Neural Quantum States for Valence-Bond States
summary: Neural-network quantum states (NQS) provide a flexible nonlinear representation of quantum many-body wavefunctions, but their efficiency depends sensitively on whether the architecture reflects the sign structure and constrained Hilbert space of the target state. In this work, we propose a solvable-point-guided strategy: design the architecture at an exactly solvable point where the correct local rules can be read off, then refine to the non-exact regime by enlarging only the kernel size and hidden dimension. The strategy is built from four physics-motivated designs: a stride-matched local-rule convolution, geometric pooling, a sign-resolving $\tanh(x^{2k+1})$ activation, and explicit spin-hole sector separation. We test this approach on quasi-one-dimensional valence-bond-solid (VBS) states and their doped soliton variants (sVBS), the exact ground states of a $t$-$J$-like model with a single mobile hole. In finite-size benchmarks, this architecture reaches high fidelity for the exact sVBS state with substantially fewer parameters than generic fully connected, convolutional, and transformer baselines tested under the same setup. For the spin sector, the learned local rule transfers from small to larger systems without retraining. Away from the solvable point, increasing kernel size and hidden dimension systematically improves accuracy, and the model shows approximately $L^2$ parameter scaling in the gapless regime for system size $L$, compared with approximately $L^4$ for matrix-product states in the same regime. Our work establishes a recipe for compact NQS in sign-structured, constrained Hilbert spaces and paves the pathway to physics-informed architectures for the broader $t$-$J$ and Hubbard families.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种基于可解点引导的策略来设计神经量子态（NQS）架构，通过匹配局域规则、几何池化、符号解析激活函数和自旋-空穴分离等物理驱动设计，在准一维价键固体（VBS）及其掺杂变体（sVBS）态上实现了高保真度，参数效率显著优于全连接、卷积和Transformer基线，并在非精确区域表现出约L²的参数缩放规律。
AI.motivation: 神经量子态的表达效率高度依赖于网络架构是否反映目标态（如t-J模型和Hubbard模型）的符号结构及约束希尔伯特空间，现有通用架构缺乏针对性设计，因此需要一种物理启发的架构设计策略。
AI.method: 提出可解点引导策略：先在精确可解点设计匹配局域规则的架构（步长匹配的局域规则卷积、几何池化、tanh(x^{2k+1})符号解析激活函数、显式自旋-空穴扇区分离），再通过增大卷积核尺寸和隐藏维度将其推广到非精确区域。
AI.result: 在准一维VBS和sVBS态上，该架构以远少于全连接、卷积和Transformer基线的参数达到了高保真度；自旋局域规则可从小系统迁移到大系统；非精确区域增大核尺寸和隐藏维度可系统提升精度；在无带隙区间参数标度约为L²（对比矩阵乘积态的L⁴）。
AI.conclusion: 建立了紧凑NQS在符号结构化和约束希尔伯特空间中的设计范式，为t-J和Hubbard族模型的物理启发性架构设计铺平了道路。

title: Interfacial Magnetotransport in a NiI_2/Graphene Heterostructure
comment: 33 pages combined main manuscript and supplementary info. Main manuscript ends on page 11, remainder is supplementary info and references. Presented as a poster as SMM 2026 and PM'26
summary: We investigate magnetotransport in a van der Waals heterostructure composed of monolayer graphene and the insulating helical antiferromagnet NiI$_2$. While NiI$_2$ is highly resistive and thus poorly suited for direct transport measurements, we demonstrate that magnetotransport in an adjacent graphene layer provides an electrical readout of magnetic-state-dependent interfacial behavior. Most notably, first-harmonic longitudinal magnetoresistance under in-plane magnetic fields exhibits large, anisotropic low-field peaks that are absent from a monolayer graphene/h-BN control device and are suppressed above the multiferroic transition temperature of NiI$_2$. Temperature-dependent harmonic measurements provide complementary evidence: the second-harmonic resistance shows the clearest nonlinear contrast relative to the control device, while the third harmonic contains a larger generic nonlinear and thermal background that is nevertheless modified in the heterostructure. These results demonstrate that graphene-based transport measurements offer a sensitive, non-invasive probe of magnetic phase behavior in electrically insulating van der Waals magnets, opening routes toward spintronic devices based on insulating vdW multiferroics.

AI.tldr: 本文通过石墨烯/NiI₂异质结构中的磁输运测量，利用石墨烯作为电学探针，检测绝缘反铁磁体NiI₂的磁性态相关界面行为，展示了石墨烯基输运测量对绝缘范德华磁体相行为的敏感探测能力。
AI.motivation: NiI₂是高电阻绝缘体，难以直接进行电输运测量，因此需要一种间接的、非侵入性的电学探测手段来研究其磁态行为。
AI.method: 构建单层石墨烯与绝缘螺旋反铁磁体NiI₂的范德华异质结构，通过石墨烯层的磁输运测量进行电学读取，结合一次谐波（纵向磁电阻）和温度依赖的高次谐波测量（二次、三次谐波电阻）分析。
AI.result: 在面内磁场下，一次谐波纵向磁电阻出现大的各向异性低场峰，该峰在石墨烯/h-BN控制器件中缺失，并在NiI₂多铁转变温度以上被抑制；二次谐波电阻展示出最显著的非线性对比，三次谐波则包含较大的通用非线性和热背景。
AI.conclusion: 石墨烯基输运测量可作为灵敏、非侵入的探针，用于探测绝缘范德华磁体的磁相行为，为基于绝缘范德华多铁材料的自旋电子学器件开辟新途径。

title: Milestoning Markov-jump dynamics: Stationary properties, thermodynamic consistency, kinetic hysteresis, and fluctuation symmetries
summary: We derive an exact coarse graining of generic Markov-jump processes into observable semi-Markov dynamics. Exact results for waiting-time distributions for jumps between observable states are derived and proved that these decompose into conditionally independent dwell and transition times. Dwell times are proved to be a local property of mesostates - they depend on the initial but not final state. Conversely, transition-path times depend on both states, trigger kinetic hysteresis, and, under suitable conditions on the hidden sub-network, are shown to obey a reflection symmetry. We characterize the stationary properties of the milestoned dynamics, prove its thermodynamic consistency, and demonstrate robustness to milestone positioning. Surprisingly, even in the limit of a time-scale separation rendering the observed dynamics approximately Markovian, the effect of kinetic hysteresis on the dissipation persists. A minimal example shows how the results lay the foundation for inferring affinities of hidden dissipative cycles from observations of transition-path times.

AI.tldr: 本文推导了马尔可夫跳跃过程到可观测半马尔可夫动力学的精确粗粒化方法，证明了等待时间分布可分解为条件独立的状态驻留时间和转移时间，并揭示了动力学滞后现象及其在热力学耗散中的持续影响。
AI.motivation: 在复杂系统中，微观马尔可夫过程的部分状态不可观测，需要粗粒化为可观测的动力学模型。现有粗粒化方法往往丢失细节或近似处理，本文旨在建立精确的粗粒化框架，保留关键的热力学和动力学特征。
AI.method: 推导了马尔可夫跳跃过程到半马尔可夫动力学模型的精确粗粒化变换；严格证明了等待时间分布可分解为条件独立的驻留时间（仅依赖初态）和转移时间（依赖初末态）；建立了动力学滞后与微观隐藏子网络结构之间的对称性关系；验证了粗粒化动力学的热力学一致性。
AI.result: 证明了驻留时间是中间态的局部性质，而转移时间依赖初末态并引发动力学滞后；即使在时间尺度分离使得观测动力学近似马尔可夫的极限下，动力学滞后对耗散的影响仍然存在；通过最小化示例展示了可以利用转移时间信息推断隐藏耗散循环的亲合力。
AI.conclusion: 该研究为从可观测的转移时间数据中推断隐藏不可观测态的耗散循环提供了理论基础，揭示了粗粒化动力学中动力学滞后与热力学耗散之间的深刻联系。

title: Optically Active Fractional Wannier-Center Displacement Drives Giant Second-Harmonic Generation
summary: Electric polarization is a static ground-state Berry-phase property, whereas second-harmonic generation (SHG) and shift current are dynamical optical responses. Their connection is encoded in the shift vector, whose Brillouin-zone average is governed by the band-resolved Berry-phase polarization difference between the optically connected initial and final states. Here we exploit this geometric relation in quantized formal polarization (QFP) crystals, where symmetry-quantized formal-polarization branches correspond to fractional Wannier-center sectors. First-principles screening identifies noncentrosymmetric QFP materials with giant SHG responses, including $\mathrm{InNbBr}_6$ and $\mathrm{InPS}_3$. Band-resolved Berry-phase analysis shows that their dominant optical transitions connect occupied and low-lying unoccupied states whose Wannier centers lie at distinct fractional Wyckoff positions, producing a large transition-resolved Wannier-center displacement. This displacement gives rise to a large shift vector and a dominant shift-vector-related intraband contribution to the static SHG susceptibility. Our results show that symmetry-quantized formal polarization can become optically active through transitions between fractional Wannier-center sectors, providing a symmetry-guided route to giant SHG and shift-current responses.

AI.tldr: 本文揭示了对称量子化铁电极化（QFP）晶体中，光学跃迁连接不同分数Wannier中心扇区时会产生巨大的shift vector，进而实现巨SHG和shift current响应，并通过第一性原理筛选预测了InNbBr₆和InPS₃等材料。
AI.motivation: 传统上电极化与SHG/shift current被视为不同物理量（静态基态性质 vs. 动态光学响应），本文旨在建立二者之间的几何联系，并利用对称量子化铁电极化来指导巨非线性光学材料的发现。
AI.method: 1. 利用shift vector的布里渊区平均与带分辨Berry-phase极化差之间的几何关系；2. 对非中心对称QFP晶体进行高通量第一性原理筛选；3. 结合带分辨的Berry-phase分析，解析光学跃迁中Wannier中心位移对shift vector和SHG的贡献。
AI.result: 1. 筛选出InNbBr₆和InPS₃等非中心对称QFP材料，具有巨大的SHG响应；2. 发现主导光学跃迁连接占据态和低能未占据态，其Wannier中心位于不同的分数Wyckoff位置，产生大的Wannier中心位移；3. 该位移导致大shift vector，从而主导静态SHG磁化率的带内贡献。
AI.conclusion: 对称量子化的铁电极化可以通过不同分数Wannier中心扇区之间的光学跃迁变得光学活性，为设计巨SHG和shift电流响应提供了对称性指导的路径。

title: Optical vortex probe of loop-current chirality in moiré materials
summary: We propose a symmetry-resolved optical probe of intrinsic loop-current chirality in moiré materials, with twisted bilayer graphene as a representative realization. Interlayer interference generates chiral electronic circulation on triangular plaquettes, giving rise to an intrinsic geometric chirality that enters the second-order response through a $C_3$-selected angular harmonic of the Berry curvature and can be isolated by the orbital-angular-momentum difference $Δ\ell$ of interfering optical vortex beams. When moiré $C_3$ symmetry is preserved, the intrinsic contribution appears in the $Δ\ell=3$ channel of the helicity-dependent dc photocurrent, whereas $C_3$-breaking perturbations activate additional channels. These results establish angular-momentum-resolved nonlinear optics as a route to probing geometric chirality in moiré and other symmetry-engineered quantum materials.

AI.tldr: 本文提出了一种对称性分辨的光学探针，用于测量莫尔材料（以扭曲双层石墨烯为代表）中的本征环路电流手性，通过轨道角动量差Δℓ=3的光学涡旋光束解耦手性响应，并建立了角动量分辨非线性光学作为探测几何手性的新方法。
AI.motivation: 现有方法难以直接探测莫尔材料中本征的环路电流手性（几何手性），需要一种对称性分辨的光学手段来隔离和测量这种手性信号。
AI.method: 利用光学涡旋光束的轨道角动量差Δℓ作为探针，结合二阶非线性光学响应（依赖于螺旋性的直流光电流），通过C₃对称性选择的Berry曲率角谐波（Δℓ=3通道）来隔离本征手性贡献。
AI.result: 在C₃对称性保持时，本征手性贡献仅出现在Δℓ=3的光电流通道中；C₃破缺时会激活其他通道，从而区分本征与非本征贡献。
AI.conclusion: 角动量分辨的非线性光学为探测莫尔材料及其他对称性工程量子材料中的几何手性提供了一条有效路径。

title: Collective relaxation eigenmodes and anisotropic magnon thermal transport in $α$-MnTe
summary: The intrinsic magnon thermal transport in the altermagnet $α$-MnTe is studied by solving the three-dimensional linearized Boltzmann transport equation with the four-magnon collision matrix. Diagonalizing the collision matrix gives direct access to the relaxation eigenmodes beyond the relaxation-time approximation. We show that Umklapp scattering lifts the momentum-related zero modes of the Normal-only collision operator and substantially modifies the low-lying relaxation spectrum. Using the same collision matrix, we compute the magnon thermal conductivity tensor. The full linearized Boltzmann transport equation result exceeds the relaxation-time approximation by more than an order of magnitude at low temperature and reveals a strong transport anisotropy, with the out-of-plane thermal conductivity remaining larger than the in-plane component over the studied temperature range. A mode-resolved analysis shows that the dominant heat-carrying modes retain momentum-like character inherited from the Normal-only zero modes, and that the larger out-of-plane conductivity mainly originates from the stronger out-of-plane group-velocity contribution, rather than from a large difference in relaxation lifetimes.

AI.tldr: 本文通过求解含四磁子碰撞矩阵的三维线性化玻尔兹曼输运方程，研究交变磁体α-MnTe的本征磁子热输运。发现Umklapp散射显著改变了低频弛豫谱，全线性化结果在低温下比弛豫时间近似高一个数量级，且面外热导率始终大于面内分量，表现出强输运各向异性。
AI.motivation: 超越弛豫时间近似(RTA)，通过精确求解包含四磁子碰撞矩阵的线性化玻尔兹曼输运方程，揭示交变磁体α-MnTe中磁子热输运的完整物理图像，特别是Umklapp散射对弛豫模式的影响及热导各向异性的微观起源。
AI.method: 求解三维线性化玻尔兹曼输运方程，采用四磁子碰撞矩阵，通过对角化碰撞矩阵直接获得弛豫本征模式，计算磁子热导率张量，并进行模式分辨分析。
AI.result: (1) Umklapp散射消除了仅含Normal散射碰撞算子的动量相关零模，显著改变了低频弛豫谱；(2) 全线性化玻尔兹曼方程结果在低温下比RTA高一个数量级以上；(3) 存在强输运各向异性，面外热导率在研究温度范围内始终大于面内分量；(4) 主导热载模式保留来自Normal零模的动量类特征；(5) 面外热导率更大主要源于更强的面外群速度贡献，而非弛豫寿命的显著差异。
AI.conclusion: 交变磁体α-MnTe的磁子热输运中，Umklapp散射对弛豫谱的修正至关重要，RTA在低温下严重低估热导率；热输运各向异性主要由群速度差异主导，而非弛豫时间差异；全线性化玻尔兹曼方程方法对于理解磁子系统中的热输运机制不可或缺。

title: Distinguishing between Direct and Parametric Driving in Nanomechanics Using a Vibrating Carbon Nanotube
summary: Parametric driving is a powerful route to amplification and nonlinear control in nanomechanical resonators, but its signatures can be ambiguous because standard dc electrical readout does not directly reveal the frequency of motion. Here we resolve this ambiguity by measuring the motional frequency of a vibrating carbon nanotube independently of the drive frequency. We operate the nanotube as an electromechanical mixer and detect microwave sidebands using a low-noise superconducting amplifier. This frequency-resolved readout distinguishes direct motion of the first overtone from parametric motion of the fundamental, even when the corresponding drive frequencies nearly coincide. The two mechanisms are further separated by their drive-power dependence. Beyond conventional parametric resonance at $2f_0$, we observe responses to driving at $3f_0$ and $4f_0$, consistent with high-order parametric excitation associated with nonlinear stiffness terms.

AI.tldr: 本文通过频率分辨读出技术，解决了碳纳米管机械谐振器中参量驱动的模糊性问题，成功区分了基频参量运动与第一泛音直接运动，并观察到了高阶参量激发（3f₀和4f₀）。
AI.motivation: 在纳米机械谐振器中，参量驱动是一种重要的放大和非线性控制手段，但标准直流电读出无法直接揭示运动频率，导致参量驱动特征存在模糊性，需要一种能够独立于驱动频率测量运动频率的方法来消除这种歧义。
AI.method: 将碳纳米管作为机电混频器运行，利用低噪声超导放大器检测微波边带，实现频率分辨读出；通过驱动功率依赖性进一步分离两种机制。
AI.result: 成功区分了第一泛音的直接运动与基频的参量运动，即使两者驱动频率几乎重合；在常规2f₀参量共振之外，还观察到对3f₀和4f₀驱动的响应，证实了与非线性刚度项相关的高阶参量激发。
AI.conclusion: 频率分辨读出技术有效解决了纳米机械谐振器中参量驱动的模糊性问题，并揭示了高阶参量激发现象，为纳米机械系统的非线性和参量控制研究提供了新的实验手段。

title: InvDesMobility: a reliability-gated first-principles feedback framework for closed-loop materials discovery
comment: 33 pages, 4 main figures, 2 main tables; Supplementary Information included
summary: Inverse materials design starts from target functionality and searches for structures that can realize it. Its value in closed-loop discovery depends not only on prediction performance, but also on whether expensive first-principles results are independently validated, provenance-recorded, and admitted as feedback only when evidence is sufficient. This is especially important for composite properties such as carrier mobility, where a final scalar value hides intermediate quantities, fit quality, convergence history, and workflow assumptions. Here we present InvDesMobility, a reliability-gated first-principles feedback framework that integrates multi-agent automated DFT, evidence stratification, generative structure proposal, acquisition ranking, and auditable release. Using 516 2DMatPedia-derived candidates, the workflow produced 280 QC-passed materials and 573 retained carrier-direction seed channels after channel-level reliability gating. These records were split into two feedback objects: relaxed structures updated the generative model, while retained mobility channels trained the acquisition model and set validation priority. Over multiple iterations, InvDesMobility screened 2.4 x 10^6 structures, submitted 102 candidates for DFT validation, and retained 86 reliability-gated generated channels across 41 formulas. Overall, the main contribution is not a fixed list of high-mobility materials, but a transferable feedback contract that makes closed-loop inverse design both useful and auditable when learning from expensive calculated properties. All source data, retained feedback records, and workflows are available at https://github.com/DreamLufei/invDesMobility, with an accompanying evidence website at https://dreamlufei.github.io/invDesMobility/.

AI.tldr: 本文提出InvDesMobility框架，一个可靠性门控的第一性原理反馈系统，用于反演材料设计中的载流子迁移率预测。该框架集成了多智能体自动化DFT、证据分层、生成式结构提议、获取排序和可审计发布，在516个候选材料中筛选出280个QC通过材料和573个保留通道，最终提出102个候选结构进行DFT验证，保留86个可靠性门控生成通道。核心贡献并非具体的高迁移率材料列表，而是一个可迁移的反馈契约，使闭环反演设计在利用昂贵计算性质时既实用又可审计。
AI.motivation: 反演材料设计从目标功能出发搜索可实现结构，其闭环价值不仅依赖预测性能，更取决于昂贵的第一性原理结果是否经过独立验证、记录来源，并且在证据充分时才被接受为反馈。这对载流子迁移率等复合性质尤其重要，因为最终标量值隐藏了中间量、拟合质量、收敛历史和工作流假设。
AI.method: 提出InvDesMobility框架，包含：(1) 多智能体自动化DFT，进行可靠性门控；(2) 证据分层，区分不同质量的反馈；(3) 生成式结构提议，不断更新生成模型；(4) 获取排序，训练采集模型并设置验证优先级；(5) 可审计发布，所有数据和流程公开。
AI.result: 从516个2DMatPedia候选材料出发，产出280个QC通过材料和573个保留载流子方向种子通道。经过多轮迭代，筛选了2.4×10^6个结构，提交102个候选进行DFT验证，最终保留86个可靠性门控生成通道，涵盖41种化学式。
AI.conclusion: 本文的主要贡献不是一个固定的高迁移率材料列表，而是一个可迁移的反馈契约，使闭环反演设计在利用昂贵计算性质时既实用又可审计。所有源代码、保留反馈记录和工作流均已开源。

title: Implementation of rotational invariance for first-principles phonons and application to low-dimensional materials
summary: The acoustic flexural (phonon) modes of low-dimensional materials should show a quadratic dispersion close to the Brillouin zone center. Any departure from this behavior in Density Functional Theory calculations is typically associated with a breaking of the rotational invariance, with few methods available to correct it. In this work, we reexamine this issue based on a reciprocal-space imposition of this condition, with corrections on the zone-center IFCs and their first and second derivatives with respect to the phonon wavevector. We propose two correction schemes for the short-range part of the interatomic force constants, one based on the Moore-Penrose pseudoinverse, that we implement in the ABINIT software package, and one based on the straight modification of the on-site antisymmetric part of the first-order derivative of the dynamical matrix with respect to the wavevector. We investigate the impact of imposing rotational invariance for different system dimensionalities and pseudopotentials. Finally, we discuss rotational invariance in the context of long-range electrostatics contribution to the IFCs. We observe that the usual treatment of electrostatics is by construction not rotationally invariant. This is found especially critical when correcting the second derivatives of the IFCs.

AI.tldr: 本文针对低维材料声子计算中旋转不变性被破坏的问题，提出了两种基于倒空间的修正方案，并在ABINIT软件中实现，系统评估了不同维度和赝势下的影响，同时揭示了长程静电贡献本身不满足旋转不变性的关键问题。
AI.motivation: 低维材料的声学弯曲（声子）模式在布里渊区中心应呈二次色散，但DFT计算常因旋转不变性被破坏而偏离此行为，现有修正方法有限，亟需更有效的方案。
AI.method: 在倒空间中施加旋转不变性条件，修正区中心IFC及其对波矢的一阶和二阶导数；提出两种方案：基于Moore-Penrose伪逆的短程IFC修正，以及基于动力学矩阵对波矢一阶导数的反对称部分的直接修正，并在ABINIT中实现。
AI.result: 研究了不同维度体系和赝势下施加旋转不变性的影响；发现长程静电贡献本身不满足旋转不变性，尤其在修正IFC二阶导数时问题尤为严重。
AI.conclusion: 所提方法有效修正了低维材料声子计算中的旋转不变性问题，但需注意静电贡献的固有局限。

title: Melt-Quench Failures and Practical Solutions for Universal Machine-Learning Interatomic Potentials in Amorphous Structure Generation
summary: Generating experimentally relevant amorphous structures via melt-quench molecular dynamics is prohibitively expensive at the first-principles level. Universal machine-learning interatomic potentials (uMLIPs) could accelerate such simulations, but their reliability under non-equilibrium conditions remains unclear. Here, we examine eight leading uMLIPs for generating amorphous IrO2, using this electrocatalytically relevant oxide as a diagnostic case. Under the conventional melt-quench protocol, all models yield unphysically expanded structures with densities of 1-4 g/cm3, far below the ab initio molecular dynamics (AIMD) reference value of 10.04 g/cm3. Comparisons against ab initio references show that accurate energies and forces alone do not ensure stable NPT dynamics; correct energy-volume responses and pressure predictions are also essential. We identify two practical remedies: pressure-targeted fine-tuning and a revised NVT-quench/NPT-equilibration protocol that avoids unphysical volume expansion without additional ab initio training data. Both recover IrO2 densities and local structures consistent with AIMD. Across 30 chemically diverse materials, the volume-expansion failure proves general, and the revised protocol substantially improves density predictions, reducing the AIMD-referenced MAE from 2.46 to 0.35 g/cm3. This work establishes practical validation criteria and simulation strategies for robust uMLIP-driven amorphous structure generation.

AI.tldr: 本文发现八种通用机器学习原子间势（uMLIPs）在通过熔融淬火分子动力学生成非晶IrO₂结构时，普遍产生密度远低于第一性原理参考值的非物理膨胀结构（1-4 g/cm³ vs 10.04 g/cm³）。研究指出仅靠准确的能量和力不足以保证稳定NPT动力学，还需正确的能量-体积响应和压力预测。作者提出两种实用补救方案：压力目标微调和修正的NVT淬火/NPT平衡协议。该体积膨胀问题在30种材料中普遍存在，修正协议可将密度MAE从2.46降至0.35 g/cm³。
AI.motivation: 从头算分子动力学（AIMD）生成实验相关的非晶结构成本过高，通用机器学习原子间势（uMLIPs）有望加速这类模拟，但其在非平衡条件下的可靠性尚不明确。本文以电催化相关的非晶IrO₂为诊断案例，系统评估uMLIPs在熔融淬火协议下的表现，旨在揭示其失效机制并提出实用解决方案。
AI.method: 选取八种领先的uMLIPs，采用标准熔融淬火协议生成非晶IrO₂结构；与AIMD参考（密度10.04 g/cm³）对比，分析能量、力、能量-体积响应和压力预测的准确性；提出压力目标微调（pressure-targeted fine-tuning）和修正的NVT淬火/NPT平衡协议两种补救方法；将结论推广至30种化学多样性的材料验证普适性。
AI.result: 所有八种uMLIPs生成的非晶IrO₂密度仅为1-4 g/cm³，远低于AIMD值；准确的能量和力预测不能保证稳定的NPT动力学；两种补救方案（压力目标微调、修正的NVT淬火/NPT平衡协议）均能恢复合理的密度和局部结构；体积膨胀问题在30种材料中普遍存在，修正协议将密度MAE从2.46降至0.35 g/cm³。
AI.conclusion: uMLIPs在实际非晶结构生成中面临系统性体积膨胀问题，单纯关注能量和力的精度不够；建立可靠的uMLIP驱动非晶结构生成需要引入能量-体积响应和压力预测等额外验证标准；提出的两种实用策略无需额外第一性原理训练数据即可显著改善结果。

title: Twistronic control of shift current in multilayer moiré system
summary: The bulk photovoltaic effect in non-centrosymmetric materials provides an alternative mechanism for the conversion of light into a current response compared to p-n junctions. Among its various contributions, the shift current is particularly attractive because it is governed by the geometric properties of electronic wavefunctions and can generate large photocurrents in low-dimensional materials. Here, we investigate the evolution of the shift current response in mono-, bi-, and trilayer H-MoS2, as well as in twisted moiré bilayers and trilayers. To describe large moiré supercells we develop a Slater-Koster tight-binding model parametrized from first-principles calculations. The resulting electronic structures and shift-current responses are compared with density functional theory calculations and Wannier-interpolated results to verify the accuracy of the approach. The model accurately reproduces the electronic structure near the band edges and captures the main spectral features of the shift current conductivity. We show that twisting breaks the crystal symmetry and activates additional conductivity tensor components that are forbidden in untwisted structures, leading to new tunable in-plane photocurrent components. Analysis of the shift distance reveals a direct connection between the twist-induced modification of the electronic wavefunctions and the increase of the nonlinear response. Our results establish the twist angle as an effective parameter for engineering shift current generation in multilayer transition-metal dichalcogenide base systems and demonstrate that tight-binding approaches provide a practical route for exploring nonlinear optical phenomena in large-scale moiré materials beyond the limits of conventional first-principles calculations.

AI.tldr: 本文通过构建Slater-Koster紧束缚模型，研究了单层、双层、三层及扭转moiré结构H-MoS₂中的Shift Current光伏效应，发现扭转角度可作为有效参数调控非线性光电流响应。
AI.motivation: 探索非中心对称材料中体光伏效应的Shift Current贡献，尤其是在低维材料中利用几何性质产生大光电流的潜力，并希望引入扭转角度作为新的调控自由度。
AI.method: 开发了基于第一性原理参数化的Slater-Koster紧束缚模型，用于描述大型moiré超胞；通过DFT和Wannier插值验证模型的准确性。
AI.result: 紧束缚模型准确再现了带边电子结构和Shift Current电导率的主要光谱特征；扭转打破晶体对称性，激活了新的电导率张量分量，产生了可调的面内光电流分量；扭转诱导的波函数修改与非线性响应增强直接相关。
AI.conclusion: 扭转角度可作为工程化Shift Current的有效参数；紧束缚方法为研究超越传统第一性原理计算极限的大尺度moiré材料中的非线性光学现象提供了实用途径。

title: Atom Probe Tomography as an Emerging Tool for Understanding Defect-driven Mechanisms in HfO$_{2}$-based Ferroelectrics
summary: HfO$_{2}$-based ferroelectrics are essential for the next generation of CMOS-compatible memory and logic devices, yet their performance is governed by a complex interplay between oxygen vacancies, dopants, and structural defects that remains an active area of investigation. These defects shape the function-critical dynamic phenomena, such as polar phase stabilization, wake-up, fatigue, and imprint. In this Perspective, we review the limitations of established high-resolution structural characterization techniques and propose atom probe tomography (APT) as a powerful tool for the three-dimensional (3D), atomic-scale mapping of all constituent species in hafnia-based ferroelectric systems. By resolving individual dopants, vacancy clustering, and interfacial segregation, APT can facilitate a quantitative understanding of defect-property relations in hafnia-based ferroelectrics. We discuss current experimental challenges for APT application to ferroelectric oxides, demonstrate a proof-of-concept of atomic-scale reconstruction in a hafnia-based device stack, and highlight the potential of APT to guide the development of ferroelectric structures with enhanced reliability and performance.

AI.tldr: 本文综述了HfO₂基铁电材料中氧空位、掺杂剂和结构缺陷的复杂相互作用，提出原子探针层析技术（APT）作为三维原子尺度映射所有组分的有力工具，并通过概念验证展示了其在铁电器件堆叠中的应用潜力。
AI.motivation: HfO₂基铁电体的性能受氧空位、掺杂剂和结构缺陷之间复杂相互作用的制约，而现有高分辨率结构表征技术存在局限，无法实现三维原子尺度的全组分映射，亟需新的表征方法以定量理解缺陷-性能关系。
AI.method: 提出原子探针层析技术（APT）用于HfO₂基铁电体系的三维原子尺度成分映射，能够解析单个掺杂原子、空位团簇和界面偏析，并在HfO₂基器件堆叠中进行了概念验证性三维原子尺度重构。
AI.result: 证明了APT能够实现HfO₂基铁电体系的三维原子尺度重构，可分辨单个掺杂剂、空位团簇和界面偏析，为定量理解缺陷-性能关系提供了可行性证据。
AI.conclusion: APT有望成为指导开发具有更高可靠性和性能的HfO₂基铁电结构的关键表征工具，克服现有技术的局限性，推动下一代CMOS兼容铁电存储与逻辑器件的发展。

title: Evolution of Nonlinear Ion Transport in Nanopore Arrays: Ionic Conductance, Current Rectification, and Osmotic Power
summary: Understanding the ionic transport and scaling behaviors in nanopore arrays is essential for bridging fundamental ion physics and blue energy applications. By fabricating sub-3 nm and sub-20 nm diameter nanopore arrays (NPAs) spanning from few pores to N ~ 10000, we systematically investigate ionic conductance, ion current rectification, and osmotic energy conversion. We report the ionic conductance scaling laws and nonlinearity with nanopore number, with stronger deviations from linearity at lower salt concentrations. Experimental evidence reveals that surface-charge-governed conductance and ion current rectification progressively weaken with increasing N and even vanish as the NPA scales up to N ~ 10000, resulting in an underestimation of surface charge density. In a sub-3 nm densely packed array (separation ~ 25 nm), the conductance exhibits an anomalous power-law dependence on concentration, deviating markedly from the single nanopore characteristics, attributed to the strong pore interactions. Furthermore, osmotic power harvesting measurements reveal a substantial reduction in power density upon scaling, with decreases of up to three orders of magnitude over the same range. To elucidate the underlying mechanism, we developed rigorous 3D modeling showing that the nonlinear behavior originates from concentration polarization at pore entrances and suppressed electric field across NPAs, collectively hindering ion transport. Our work provides insight into nonlinear ion-transport scaling and reveals fundamental differences between transport phenomena in single nanopores and nanopore arrays.

AI.tldr: 本文系统研究了亚3纳米和亚20纳米孔径的纳米孔阵列（NPAs）中离子输运和渗透能量转换的缩放行为，发现随着孔数增加，离子电导非线性偏离、表面电荷效应减弱，且在亚3纳米密集阵列中出现反常的幂律依赖关系，渗透功率密度可下降三个数量级，归因于浓度极化和电场抑制。
AI.motivation: 理解纳米孔阵列中的离子输运和缩放行为对于连接基础离子物理与蓝色能源应用至关重要，现有研究多聚焦于单纳米孔，缺乏对阵列规模化效应的系统认识。
AI.method: 制备了亚3 nm和亚20 nm直径的纳米孔阵列（从少量孔到N≈10000），通过实验测量离子电导、离子电流整流和渗透能量转换，并结合严格的3D建模分析。
AI.result: 发现离子电导随孔数增加呈非线性缩放，低浓度下偏差更显著；表面电荷主导的电导和整流效应随N增大而减弱甚至消失（N≈10000时）；亚3 nm密集阵列中出现反常幂律依赖；渗透功率密度缩放后下降可达三个数量级。
AI.conclusion: 非线性行为源于孔入口处的浓度极化和跨阵列电场的抑制，揭示了单纳米孔与纳米孔阵列之间离子输运的根本差异，为能源应用中的阵列设计提供重要指导。

title: Moiré trapping of quadrupolar excitons in van der Waals trilayers
summary: Quadrupolar excitons in van der Waals heterostructures - quantum superpositions of anti-aligned dipolar excitons - offer a novel platform to explore exotic many-body physics, with applications to quantum sensing and photonic devices. Yet their internal structure, symmetry, and real-space localisation remain largely unknown. Here, we reveal the atomic-scale structure of quadrupolar excitons in twisted WSe2/WS2/WSe2 trilayers by solving the Bethe-Salpeter equation within a large-scale atomistic framework. We discover that large atomic relaxations at small twist angles give rise to two distinct quadrupolar excitons trapped at moiré lattice sites, differing in the in-plane symmetry of the electron density about the hole: one azimuthally symmetric, with the density maximal at the hole, and one threefold symmetric, with a node at the hole. Moiré trapping, neglected in commonly used models of quadrupolar exciton formation, is critical to their many-exciton phases. Without moiré trapping, quadrupolar excitons transition into anti-parallel dipolar excitons on a bipartite square lattice, while with trapping, the same dipoles are confined to a triangular lattice and experience geometric frustration. Our study uncovers the highly non-trivial nature of quadrupolar excitons, with direct implications for simulating frustrated quantum magnetism in a fully tunable excitonic platform.

AI.tldr: 本文通过大规模原子框架求解Bethe-Salpeter方程，揭示了扭转WSe2/WS2/WSe2三层结构中四极激子的原子尺度结构：在微小扭转角下，大原子弛豫产生两种不同面内对称性的四极激子（轴对称和三次对称），并发现莫尔陷阱对多激子相至关重要，无陷阱时四极激子转变为反平行偶极激子形成方格，有陷阱时则形成三角格并出现几何阻挫。
AI.motivation: 四极激子作为反排列偶极激子的量子叠加态，在量子传感和光子器件中有重要应用前景，但其内部结构、对称性和实空间局域化特征仍然未知，现有研究缺乏对其原子尺度结构的理解。
AI.method: 采用大规模原子框架求解Bethe-Salpeter方程，对扭转WSe2/WS2/WSe2三层结构中的四极激子进行原子尺度建模和分析。
AI.result: 发现了两种不同面内对称性的四极激子：一种电子密度绕空穴呈轴对称分布（极大值在空穴处），另一种呈三次对称分布（空穴处为节点）。莫尔陷阱被证明对多激子相行为至关重要，决定了激子从反平行偶极激子（无陷阱，形成方格）到受束缚的三角格（有陷阱，出现几何阻挫）的转变。
AI.conclusion: 揭示了四极激子的高度非平凡本质，为在完全可调谐的激子平台上模拟阻挫量子磁性提供了直接途径。

title: GaN Nucleation Landscape on Patterned Sapphire Shaped by the Growth Temperature of Directly Grown Boron-Compound Masks
summary: The growth temperature of directly grown boron-compound masks on patterned sapphire can modify the local accessibility of the underlying sapphire surface and thereby alter the subsequent nucleation behavior of GaN. In this work, we investigate how ammonia-borane-derived boron-compound masks grown at different temperatures shape the GaN nucleation landscape within circular SiO$_2$ openings during the initial stage of epitaxial lateral overgrowth. The preferential nucleation position of GaN changes systematically with mask growth temperature: masks grown at 700--750$^\circ$C produce pronounced edge-biased distributions, whereas higher-temperature masks lead to more inward-shifted and spatially sparse GaN domains. Quantitative analysis of the GaN areal fraction, the number of visibly isolated domains, and the radial distribution of domain centers shows that the mask growth temperature affects both the amount of GaN coverage and the spatial arrangement of GaN domains within each opening. The nonmonotonic change in the number of visibly isolated domains is interpreted as a consequence of competition between reduced lateral merging and reduced effective substrate accessibility, rather than as a direct measure of the number of active nucleation sites. Kinetic Monte Carlo simulations reproduce the essential experimental trends by varying the effective density and radial distribution of substrate-accessible sites. These results suggest that the growth temperature of directly formed boron-compound masks provides a practical means of reshaping the intra-opening GaN nucleation landscape by controlling the spatial distribution and effectiveness of local pathways through which GaN precursors can access the underlying sapphire surface.

AI.tldr: 本文研究了硼化合物掩膜生长温度如何调控蓝宝石衬底上GaN的成核行为，通过实验和动力学蒙特卡洛模拟揭示了温度对成核位置分布和空间排列的影响机制。
AI.motivation: 探究氨硼烷衍生的硼化合物掩膜的生长温度能否作为调控GaN成核景观（包括成核位置偏好、空间分布和密度）的有效手段，为优化外延横向过生长工艺提供新思路。
AI.method: 在不同温度（700–750°C及更高温度）下制备硼化合物掩膜，在圆形SiO₂开口内观察GaN成核行为；通过定量分析GaN面积分数、孤立域数量和径向分布来表征成核景观；并利用动力学蒙特卡洛（KMC）模拟来验证和解释实验现象。
AI.result: 低温掩膜（700–750°C）导致GaN优先在开口边缘成核，呈现边缘偏置分布；高温掩膜则使成核向内偏移且空间更稀疏。孤立域数量呈非单调变化，归因于横向合并减少与有效衬底可及性降低之间的竞争。KMC模拟通过改变可及位点的密度和径向分布成功复现了实验趋势。
AI.conclusion: 硼化合物掩膜的生长温度为调控GaN在开口内的成核景观提供了实用手段，通过控制前驱体到达蓝宝石衬底的局部路径的空间分布和有效性来发挥作用。

title: Data-Driven Micromechanical Characterization and Mapping of Shale Rocks Using High Speed Nanoindentation
summary: This study investigates the potential of high-speed nanoindentation in collaboration with data analytics and phase volume fractions to achieve micromechanical characterization of heterogeneous rocks. While micromechanical characterization can be performed using mechanical testing alone, integrating chemical analysis-such as elemental mapping techniques-provides essential phase identification. This enables more accurate interpretation of phase-specific mechanical properties. However, incorporating chemical analysis increases the complexity of the process. Hence, this study proposes data-driven micromechanical characterization and mapping of heterogeneous rocks based primarily on mechanical data and limited dependence on chemical analysis. In this study, Mancos shale rock is analyzed using high-speed nanoindentation to determine the mechanical properties at the microscale. Subsequently, a suite of unsupervised statistical learning techniques, such as Uniform Manifold Approximation and Projection (UMAP) with k-means Clustering, Gaussian Mixture Model (GMM), Dirichlet Process Mixture Model (DPMM), and Density-Based Spatial Clustering of Applications with Noise (DBSCAN), are applied to the nanoindentation data. Additionally, an automated image processing and segmentation technique was developed and tested. The results from each technique have been systematically compared against the conventional chemo-mechanical approach using two metrics: weighted error and spatial error. Based on the results, UMAP with k-means clustering is the most appropriate technique, while DBSCAN, DPMM, and image segmentation techniques are more suitable as secondary approaches. This study demonstrates the capability of high-speed nanoindentation combined with machine learning techniques for micromechanical characterization with reduced analytical complexity and improved workflow efficiency.

AI.tldr: 本研究提出结合高速纳米压痕与无监督机器学习（UMAP+k-means等）的方法，在减少化学分析依赖的同时实现页岩微观力学表征，并通过多种聚类技术对比验证了该方法的高效性和准确性。
AI.motivation: 传统微观力学表征依赖化学分析进行物相识别，过程复杂且效率低。本文旨在通过数据驱动的方法，主要基于力学数据、降低对化学分析的依赖，实现异质岩石的微观力学表征与物相映射。
AI.method: 对Mancos页岩进行高速纳米压痕获取微观力学数据；应用UMAP+k-means、GMM、DPMM、DBSCAN等多种无监督学习技术进行聚类分析；开发自动化图像处理与分割技术；利用加权误差和空间误差两种指标与常规化学-力学方法进行系统比较。
AI.result: UMAP结合k-means聚类是最佳方法，而DBSCAN、DPMM及图像分割更适合作为辅助手段。数据驱动方法能有效降低分析复杂度，提高工作流程效率。
AI.conclusion: 高速纳米压痕结合机器学习技术能够实现异质岩石的微观力学表征，减少对化学分析的依赖，提升分析效率，为岩石微观力学研究提供了新的高效途径。

title: High-entropy Fe$_2$VAl-based thermoelectric modules with improved conversion efficiency
summary: Thermoelectric (TE) materials enable the direct conversion of heat into electricity and are attractive for sustainable energy applications. For practical deployment, TE materials must combine high efficiency with low cost, non-toxicity, and scalability. In this work, we optimize the TE performance of low-cost and robust Fe$_2$VAl-based full-Heusler compounds through high-entropy engineering: a synergistic combination of heavy-element doping and controlled off-stoichiometry results in substitutional disorder on all lattice sites, triggering one of the lowest lattice thermal conductivities, $κ_\text{L}\sim2.3$ W m$^{-1}$ K$^{-1}$, reported so far for full-Heusler systems. The resulting materials exhibit improved values of the average figure of merit $zT_\text{ave}\approx 0.3$ from $300-500$ K. To demonstrate reproducibility and technological relevance, a full TE module (TEM) based on the optimized alloys was fabricated and characterized. Scaled-up material batches were synthesized by hot pressing, exhibiting TE properties in excellent agreement with laboratory-scale samples, with only slightly increased resistivities in absence of post-annealing treatments. Owing to the excellent mechanical workability of Fe$_2$VAl-based materials, the TEM legs were directly brazed onto copper electrodes, enabling robust module fabrication. A ($6\times 6$)-leg TEM was assembled and systematically characterized. The device exhibits the highest output power and one of the highest conversion efficiencies reported to date for Fe$_2$VAl-based generators over the broad temperature range of $300-673$ K, underscoring the potential of this material system for scalable TE energy harvesting.

AI.tldr: 本文通过高熵工程优化了低成本、环保的Fe₂VAl基全霍斯勒化合物的热电性能，实现了极低的晶格热导率（~2.3 W m⁻¹ K⁻¹）和平均热电优值zT≈0.3（300-500 K），并成功制备了6×6热电模块，在300-673 K范围内实现了目前Fe₂VAl基器件中最高的输出功率和转换效率。
AI.motivation: 热电材料需兼具高效、低成本、无毒和可规模化特性，而现有全霍斯勒化合物在此方面仍有提升空间，特别是热导率过高限制了热电性能。
AI.method: 采用高熵工程策略，通过重元素掺杂与可控非化学计量比的协同组合，在所有晶格位点引入替代无序，从而显著降低晶格热导率。
AI.result: 实现了极低晶格热导率κ_L≈2.3 W m⁻¹ K⁻¹，平均zT≈0.3（300-500 K）；规模化热压样品与实验室样品性能高度一致；6×6模块在300-673 K范围内展现出最高输出功率和最高转换效率之一。
AI.conclusion: Fe₂VAl基全霍斯勒化合物通过高熵工程优化后，具有优异的可重复性、机械加工性和规模化潜力，在热电能量收集领域前景广阔。
